RECORDS.bookname: Now, Discover Your Strengths: The revolutionary Gallup program that shows you how to develop your unique talents and strengths
RECORDS.bookabout: What if excellence isn't well‑rounded but sharply focused? Could your biggest gains come from talents you already show? What changes when you name your Signature Themes, manage around weaknesses, and design work for outcomes instead of identical methods?

RECORDS.bookname: 现在，发现你的优势：盖洛普的革命性项目，教你如何发展你的独特天赋与优势
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果卓越不是面面俱到，而是高度聚焦，会怎样？你最大的提升是否可能来自你已经展现的天赋？当你点明自己的优势主题，绕开弱项进行管理，并以结果为导向来设计工作，而不是拘泥于同一种做法时，会发生什么变化？

RECORDS.bookname: Origin Story: A Big History of Everything
RECORDS.bookabout: From cosmic birth to human futures, who sets the rules—gravity or stories? How do Goldilocks conditions and energy flows forge stars, cells, cities, and crises? Could collective learning become our next threshold, or will entropy send the bill?

RECORDS.bookname: 起源故事：万物的大历史
RECORDS.bookabout: 从宇宙的诞生到人类的未来，究竟是谁在设定规则——引力，还是故事？恰到好处的条件与能量的流动如何塑造出恒星、细胞、城市和危机？集体学习会成为我们的下一个门槛吗，还是熵会来结账？

RECORDS.bookname: One Thousand Ways to Make $1000: Practical Suggestions, Based on Actual Experience, for Starting a Business of Your Own and Making Money in Your Spare Time
RECORDS.bookabout: What if earning your first thousand were less about big ideas and more about tiny, testable moves? Could salesmanship, small manufacture, mail order, and service contracts fund study, community projects, and long-term wealth—while staying scrappy, practical, and resilient?

RECORDS.bookname: 一千种赚一千美元的方法：基于真实经验的实用建议，助你创办自己的事业，并在业余时间赚钱
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果赚到你的第一个一千，与其依赖宏大的想法，不如专注于那些微小而可验证的举措，会怎样？销售技巧、小批量生产、邮购和服务合同，能否为学习、社区项目以及长期财富提供资金支持——同时保持拼劲、务实和韧性？

RECORDS.bookname: Perfectly Reasonable Deviations from the Beaten Track: The Letters of Richard P. Feynman
RECORDS.bookabout: A life traced through letters —from early study and wartime duty to teaching clarity , illness , and a space-shuttle reckoning —does curiosity joined with stubborn honesty become a method? Will you follow this arc from 1939 to 1987?

RECORDS.bookname: 理所当然的离经叛道：理查德·P·费曼书信集
RECORDS.bookabout: 一段以书信勾勒的人生——从早年的求学与战时任务，到教人把话讲清楚、与疾病相伴，以及对航天飞机的一场清算——当好奇心与倔强的坦诚结合，会不会化为一种方法？你愿意沿着这段轨迹，从1939年走到1987年吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Peopleware: Productive Projects and Teams
RECORDS.bookabout: Is productivity really about tools, or about people, space, and trust? What if flow, sane schedules, and servant leadership beat heroics? Could small experiments, risk buffers, and self-healing culture turn fragile projects into resilient teams worth staying for?

RECORDS.bookname: 人件：高效项目与团队建设
RECORDS.bookabout: 生产力究竟是工具的事情，还是更关乎人,空间,信任？如果心流,合理的日程,服务型领导胜过英雄主义呢？小实验,风险缓冲,自愈文化能否把脆弱的项目变成让人愿意留下的韧性团队？

RECORDS.bookname: Hunger of Memory: The Education of Richard Rodriguez
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a child's private Spanish home collides with the public English of school? When faith bridges, yet ambition widens, the gap? When complexion, policy, and success demand a price—paid in silence—then redeemed through writing?

RECORDS.bookname: 记忆的饥渴：理查德·罗德里格斯的教育
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一个孩子在家里说西班牙语的私人世界与学校公开的英语发生碰撞时，会发生什么？当信仰试图架起桥梁，而野心却把这道鸿沟拉得更宽时呢？当肤色、政策与成功都索取代价——以沉默来支付——而后又通过写作得以赎回之时呢？

RECORDS.bookname: Ignition!: An Informal History of Liquid Rocket Propellants
RECORDS.bookabout: From eccentric labs to missile silos and moonbound stages, this narrative asks: why did readiness trump purity? why did hypergols win while boranes fizzled? what makes ClF3 terrifying, LOX/LH2 demanding, and engine design a dance of risky tradeoffs?

RECORDS.bookname: 点火！液体火箭推进剂的非正式史
RECORDS.bookabout: 从古怪的实验室，到导弹发射井，再到奔向月球的火箭级，这段叙事发问：为什么准备就绪压倒了纯粹？为什么自燃推进剂赢了，而硼烷却败下阵来？是什么让氯三氟化物令人恐惧、让液氧/液氢要求极高、而让发动机设计变成一场充满风险的权衡之舞？

RECORDS.bookname: In Fed We Trust: Ben Bernanke's War on the Great Panic
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the real drama of 2008 wasn't Wall Street greed, but an institution rewriting its playbook overnight? How do swap lines, zero rates, and capital injections decide who survives a global run—and at what democratic cost?

RECORDS.bookname: 我们信任美联储：本·伯南克与大恐慌之战
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果2008年的真正戏剧不是华尔街的贪婪，而是某个机构在一夜之间重写了自己的操作手册呢？货币互换额度、零利率和资本注入，如何决定谁能在一场全球性挤兑中活下来——又要付出怎样的民主代价？

RECORDS.bookname: Infinite Powers: How Calculus Reveals the Secrets of the Universe
RECORDS.bookabout: What if slicing change into infinitesimal steps unlocks motion, growth, and waves? How far can algorithms, probability, and networks carry understanding? Where do chaos, AI, and quantum blur prediction with meaning? Ready to test reason's limits—and your own?

RECORDS.bookname: 无限的力量：微积分如何揭示宇宙的秘密
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果把变化拆解为无穷小的微步，是否就能开启运动、增长与波动的秘密？算法、概率与网络，究竟能把理解推进到多远？混沌、人工智能与量子，又在何处让预测与意义彼此交融而变得模糊？准备好去试探理性的极限——以及你自己的极限了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: It's All Too Much Workbook: The Tools You Need to Conquer Clutter and Create the Life You Want
RECORDS.bookabout: What if clutter isn't a storage issue at all but a values decision? What if rooms served your life, not your stuff? Ready to set a vision, move fast, lock habits, and stop new chaos at the door?

RECORDS.bookname: 一切都太多了工作手册：你需要的工具，帮你摆脱杂乱，打造你想要的生活
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果杂乱根本不是收纳问题，而是关于价值取舍的决定呢？如果房间服务的是你的生活，而不是你的东西呢？准备好设定愿景、快速行动、固化习惯，并把新的混乱挡在门外了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Investing Between the Lines: How to Make Smarter Decisions By Decoding CEO Communications
RECORDS.bookabout: What if CEO letters were financial X-rays rather than fluff? Could candor versus FOG  reveal culture, risk, and free‑cash‑flow discipline—and even hint at future performance ? Ready to read between the lines and invest smarter?

RECORDS.bookname: 字里行间的投资：通过解码CEO沟通做出更明智的决策
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果首席执行官的信不再是空话套话，而是财务X光片，会怎样？坦诚与迷雾的对比能否揭示文化,风险,自由现金流纪律，甚至暗示未来表现？准备好读懂字里行间,更聪明地投资了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Jed McKenna's Theory of Everything: The Enlightened Perspective
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your world is best‑guess reality, not fact ? What happens when you "just switch the labels"—universe under consciousness—so "there is only consciousness"  ? Ready to test what remains when belief burns away ?

RECORDS.bookname: 杰德·麦肯纳的万有理论：开悟的视角
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的世界并非事实，而只是基于最合理猜测的现实，会怎样？当你“只把标签换一换”——让宇宙从属于意识——于是“只剩意识”时，又会如何？当信念燃烧殆尽，你准备好检验还剩下什么了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Keeping At It: The Quest for Sound Money and Good Government
RECORDS.bookabout: What if monetary credibility is forged through painful choices, not charters? How did gold, fixed rates, and politics collide? Can tough policy tame inflation yet guard banks? And who rebuilds trust so public institutions actually work?

RECORDS.bookname: 坚持到底：健全货币与良好政府的追求
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果货币公信力不是靠章程，而是通过痛苦的抉择铸就，会怎样？黄金、固定汇率与政治如何碰撞？强硬的政策能否既抑制通胀，又守住银行的安全？又是谁重建信任，让公共机构真正发挥作用？

RECORDS.bookname: Limping on Water: My 40-Year Adventure with One of America's Outstanding Communications Companies
RECORDS.bookabout: Is this merely a media memoir—or a blueprint for scrappy ownership, local grit, and network turnarounds? How do frugality, autonomy, and hard choices ripple from small stations to national mornings, and from boardrooms to family grief and global service?

RECORDS.bookname: 水上跛行：我在一家美国杰出传媒公司的四十年历险
RECORDS.bookabout: 这究竟只是一本媒体回忆录，还是一份关于草根式持有、本地韧劲和电视网重振的蓝图？节俭、自主与艰难抉择，如何层层荡开，从地方小台传导到全国早间节目，又从董事会议室延展至家庭的悲痛与全球服务？

RECORDS.bookname: Mastering the Core Teachings of the Buddha: An Unusually Hardcore Dharma Book
RECORDS.bookabout: What if awakening were a trainable skill, mapped step by step? Could concentration, ethics, and moment‑to‑moment insight be tested like experiments, even in daily life? Would jhanas, insight stages, and clear standards replace mystique with workable results?

RECORDS.bookname: 精通佛陀核心教义：一本格外硬核的佛法书
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果觉醒是一项可训练的技能，并且有清晰的逐步路线，会怎样？专注、伦理与当下的洞察，能否像做实验一样被检验，甚至在日常生活中也行得通？禅那、洞见阶段与明确的标准，是否能够以可操作的成果取代神秘感？

RECORDS.bookname: Read Your Mind: Proven Habits for Success from the World’s Greatest Mentalist
RECORDS.bookabout: What if you could read people, not minds? Engineer choices without force? Build habits that survive bad days? Turn rejection into fuel and weakness into leverage? Win trust, negotiate smarter, and tell stories that move others to act—starting today?

RECORDS.bookname: 洞悉人心：世界上最伟大的心灵魔术师的经得起检验的成功习惯
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你能读懂人，而不是读心？不用强迫，就能精准引导别人的选择？养成在最糟糕的日子也能坚持的习惯？把拒绝化为燃料，把弱点化为杠杆？赢得信任、更聪明地谈判，并讲出让人立刻行动的故事——从今天开始？

RECORDS.bookname: God's Debris: A Thought Experiment
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the universe is God's shattered afterthought—uniform matter plus omnipresent probability—guiding everything, including you ? What if free will, science, morality, and stress are useful illusions we ride to help reassemble consciousness  ?

RECORDS.bookname: 上帝的碎片：一个思想实验
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果宇宙其实是上帝破碎的事后之念——由均匀的物质与无所不在的概率构成——并引导着一切，包括你，会怎样？如果自由意志、科学、道德和压力，都是我们赖以前行、用来帮助重组意识的有用幻象，又会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: Genius: The Life and Science of Richard Feynman
RECORDS.bookabout: What if scientific playfulness could be a method, not a mood? How does a tinkering child become a wartime problem‑solver, then a public conscience? Want to see quantum ideas, engineering grit, and moral clarity collide across decades?

RECORDS.bookname: 天才：理查德费曼的生平与科学
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果科学的玩心不只是情绪，而是一种方法，会怎样？一个爱鼓捣的孩子，如何在战时成为解难能手，进而成为公共良知？想看量子理念、工程师的韧劲与道德清明跨越数十年的激烈碰撞吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Legacy Life: Leading Your Family to Make a Difference for Eternity
RECORDS.bookabout: What if inheritance isn't about money but motion? What if a family code, shared stories, and repaired bonds could ripple for a century? Ready to trade short-term wins for an eternal horizon—and start today?

RECORDS.bookname: 传承人生：带领你的家庭创造永恒的影响
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果传承不是金钱，而是行动力呢？如果一套家训、共同的故事和修复的亲情纽带，能激起延续百年的涟漪呢？你准备好用短期的小胜，换取永恒的远景——并从今天开始吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Build a Large Language Model
RECORDS.bookabout: Curious how blank-slate tensors became talkative partners? Why prompting wobbles, retrieval steadies, and alignment negotiates values? Want agents, tools, and multimodal senses without losing safety, privacy, or fairness? Ready to confront trade-offs behind today's confident yet fragile intelligences?

RECORDS.bookname: 大型语言模型
RECORDS.bookabout: 好奇白纸般的张量如何变成健谈的伙伴吗？为什么提示会摇摆不定、检索能让模型稳住，而对齐则在价值之间斡旋？想要在不失安全、隐私、公平的前提下，拥有智能体、工具和多模态感知吗？准备好直面当下这些自信却脆弱的智能背后的权衡了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: For the Love of Physics: From the End of the Rainbow to the Edge of Time—A Journey Through the Wonders of Physics
RECORDS.bookabout: Crave a guide that turns error bars into trust , pendulums into proofs , and rainbows into wave logic ? Curious how everyday hunches scale to auroras, X-ray bursters , and black holes —bridging classroom to cosmos, measurement to meaning, laughter to awe?

RECORDS.bookname: 爱上物理：从彩虹尽头到时间的边缘——穿越物理奇观之旅
RECORDS.bookabout: 渴望一部指南，能把误差线化为信任、把摆锤化为证明、把彩虹化作波的逻辑吗？好奇日常的直觉如何扩展到极光、X射线暴、黑洞——把课堂与宇宙相连，把测量化为意义，让笑声化作敬畏？

RECORDS.bookname: Marine Biotechnology: Studies and Applications
RECORDS.bookauthor: Shaju S. S./Vipin P. M./Visakh P. M.
RECORDS.bookabout: From microbes to macroalgae, enzymes to biomaterials, it shows how ocean resources power drugs, fuels, packaging, and aquaculture with greener methods . How do omics, nanotech, and life‑cycle thinking convert marine diversity into therapies and sustainable systems ?

RECORDS.bookname: Fifty Years of Medieval Technology and Social Change
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a stirrup, a plough, and a mill reshaped Europe—and the very idea of time?  This study revisits bold theses with micro-evidence on gears, hoists, monasteries, and climate shocks, reframing causality, faith, and ecology.

RECORDS.bookname: 海洋生物技术：研究与应用
RECORDS.bookauthor: Shaju S. S./Vipin P. M./Visakh P. M.
RECORDS.bookabout: 从微生物到大型藻类，从酶到生物材料，它展示了海洋资源如何以更绿色的方法驱动药物、燃料、包装和水产养殖的发展。组学、纳米技术与全生命周期思维，如何将海洋生物多样性转化为疗法与可持续体系？

RECORDS.bookname: 中世纪技术与社会变迁五十年
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果马镫、犁和磨坊不仅重塑了欧洲，甚至重塑了对时间的观念，会怎样？本研究借助关于齿轮,提升装置,修道院,气候冲击的微观证据，重审大胆论断，并重新界定因果、信仰与生态。

RECORDS.bookname: Look Out: The Delight and Danger of Taking the Long View
RECORDS.bookabout: What if seeing from higher and farther grants wisdom and yet licenses harm? Can a planet-wide gaze, commercial satellites, and geoint dashboards reveal truth while erasing lives below? Maps promise order; automation tempts belief over scrutiny .

RECORDS.bookname: 放眼长远：长远眼光的乐趣与风险
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果从更高更远的视角观看能带来智慧，却也为伤害开绿灯，该怎么办？全球凝视、商业卫星和地理空间情报仪表板，能在揭示真相的同时抹去地面上的生命吗？地图承诺秩序，自动化让人更愿意相信而不去审视。

RECORDS.bookname: Metamorphosis: A Natural and Human History
RECORDS.bookabout: From Suriname field plates  to a 2022 "molecular trinity" , from Haeckel's trees  to thyroid echoes in puberty , isn't this about why bodies risk total rewiring—and whether anything anchors a self when memories flicker? Ready to test your answer?

RECORDS.bookname: 变形：自然与人类的历史
RECORDS.bookabout: 从苏里南野外采集的底片，到2022年的“分子三位一体”；从海克尔的树谱，到青春期里的甲状腺回声，这不正是在追问：为什么身体会冒险进行全盘重构——以及当记忆忽明忽暗时，是否还有什么能锚住自我？准备好检验你的答案了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Math Cats: Scratching the Surface of Mathematical Concepts
RECORDS.bookabout: Curious how cat ears reveal triangles, Egyptian fractions split fair shares, and Fibonacci guides finance? What if birthday coincidences, bridge puzzles, chaos, scaling laws, knots, and game strategy all intertwined? Ready to rethink rules, patterns, and certainty through playful experiments?

RECORDS.bookname: 数学猫：浅探数学概念
RECORDS.bookabout: 好奇猫耳朵如何揭示三角形的奥秘,埃及分数如何公平分配,斐波那契如何指引金融吗？如果把生日巧合,桥梁谜题,混沌,标度律,绳结,游戏策略都交织在一起,会怎样？准备好通过趣味实验,重新思考规则、模式与确定性了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Nuclear Age: An Epic Race for Arms, Power, and Survival
RECORDS.bookabout: What if history's survival hinged on fallible operators, not grand doctrines? From wartime labs to thermonuclear standoffs, from secret arsenals to modern signaling and frayed treaties—could a multipolar, tech-accelerated world repeat 1962's peril under new masks?

RECORDS.bookname: 核时代：军备、权力与生存的史诗竞赛
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果历史的存续不取决于宏大理论，而取决于那些难免出错的操作者，会怎样？从战时实验室到热核对峙，从秘密武库到现代信号传递与日渐式微的条约——一个多极化、技术加速的世界，会不会披着新外衣重演1962年的险境？

RECORDS.bookname: Plunder and Survival: Stories of Theft, Loss, Recovery, and Migration of Nazi Uprooted Art
RECORDS.bookabout: How did a regime weaponize taste, dealers turn shame into currency, and museums face delayed justice? Who ferried Europe's masterpieces to America—and at what cost? And why do provenance files still decide destinies?

RECORDS.bookname: 劫掠与幸存：被纳粹连根拔起的艺术品的盗窃、失落、寻回与流转的故事
RECORDS.bookabout:
一个政权如何将品味武器化，艺术品经销商怎样把耻辱变成资本，而博物馆又如何面对迟到的正义？
是谁把欧洲的传世名作运往美国——付出了怎样的代价？
又为何来源档案至今仍能左右命运？

RECORDS.bookname: Catching Cheats: Everyday Forensics to Unmask Business Fraud
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wondered how data fingerprints expose fraud before auditors? Why insiders move first, managers bend earnings, and hype machines rig prices? Want a guide to spotting signals across markets, crypto, and governance fixes?

RECORDS.bookname: 揪出骗子：用日常取证揭开商业欺诈的真面目
RECORDS.bookabout: 你是否好奇，数据指纹如何在审计师发现之前就揪出欺诈？为什么内部人士总能抢先一步，管理层会美化利润，而炒作机器操纵价格？想要一份指南，教你如何在各类市场、加密领域以及治理改进中识别这些信号吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Elbows Up!: Canadian Voices of Resilience and Resistance
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a nation's strength lies in staying unfinished? Can sovereignty be practiced daily—through treaties, art, and elbows raised—beside a restless superpower? Ready to test identity against memory, crisis, and many stubborn, necessary questions?

RECORDS.bookname: 胳膊肘抬起！加拿大韧性与抗争之声
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个国家的力量，恰恰在于保持未完成的状态呢？在一个躁动不安的超级大国身旁，主权能否通过条约、艺术，以及抬起手肘的抗争，日复一日地加以践行？你是否准备好，让身份在记忆、危机，以及那些顽固却必不可少的问题面前接受检验？

RECORDS.bookname: The Emergent Mind: How Intelligence Arises in People and Machines
RECORDS.bookabout: What if intelligence isn't coded but grown—through neurons and networks, error and context? How do habits, goals, and language emerge from simple learning rules? And what can today's large models reveal—and still miss—about minds, meaning, and control?

RECORDS.bookname: 涌现的心智：智力如何在人类与机器中产生
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果智能不是被编码出来的，而是生长出来的——通过神经元与网络、错误与语境——会怎样？
习惯、目标和语言又如何从简单的学习规则中涌现出来？
那么，当下的大模型能揭示关于心智、意义与控制的哪些真相，又仍然会错过什么？

RECORDS.bookname: Generation Restoration: How to Fix Our Relationship Crisis with Mother Nature
RECORDS.bookabout: What if restoration isn't charity but infrastructure? Could forests regulate rain, cities green themselves, and finance reward reciprocity? How might Indigenous governance, satellites, and community budgets align so one generation rewrites our pact with water, soil, and climate?

RECORDS.bookname: 恢复世代：如何修复我们与大自然的关系危机
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果生态修复不是慈善，而是基础设施，会怎样？
森林能否调节降雨，城市能否自我绿化，金融能否为互惠关系提供激励？
原住民治理、卫星与社区预算如何协同起来，让一代人重写我们与水、土壤和气候的契约？

RECORDS.bookname: Exactly What to Say: The Magic Words for Influence and Impact
RECORDS.bookabout: Want words that nudge choices without pressure? Curious how tiny phrases spark yes/no momentum, paint future feelings, simplify options, and turn objections into questions? Ready to test scripts that make decisions feel inevitable yet ethical—and immediately actionable?

RECORDS.bookname: 说什么才对：影响力与效果的魔法词句
RECORDS.bookabout: 想要用不施压的措辞，轻轻推动对方做出选择吗？好奇简短的措辞如何激发答应或不答应的势头、勾勒未来的感受、简化选项，并把异议转为提问？准备好试用那些让决策看起来水到渠成、又合乎伦理，并且立刻可付诸行动的话术了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Emotional Blackmail: When the People in Your Life Use Fear, Obligation, and Guilt to Manipulate You
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever felt love turned into leverage? Wondered why fear, obligation, and guilt script your yes? Ready to spot the loop, disarm hot buttons, and set boundaries without drama? What if changing your behavior quietly rewired the entire relationship?

RECORDS.bookname: 情感勒索：当身边的人用恐惧、义务和内疚控制你
RECORDS.bookabout:
你有没有过这样的感觉：爱被拿来当筹码？
是不是会想，为什么恐惧、义务感、内疚总在幕后导演你的“答应”？
准备好看清循环、拆除那些一按就爆的情绪按钮，并且不生事地立好界限了吗？
如果你改变自己的行为，能悄悄重构整段关系，会怎么样？

RECORDS.bookname: Follow Up and Close the Sale: Make Easy (and Effective) Follow-Up Your Winning Habit
RECORDS.bookabout: What if follow-up isn't pestering but the bridge that lowers risk? What if every touch ends with a clear next step? Ready to turn cadence, cross-channel messaging, micro-commitments, and disciplined habits into reliable wins without pressure?

RECORDS.bookname: 跟进并促成成交：让简单又有效的跟进成为你的制胜习惯
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果跟进不是纠缠不休，而是降低风险的桥梁，会怎样？如果每一次触达都以清晰的下一步收尾，会怎样？准备好把跟进节奏、跨渠道沟通、微承诺和自律习惯，化作不施压却可靠的业绩了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Who Better Than You?: The Art of Healthy Arrogance & Dreaming Big
RECORDS.bookabout: What if confidence were a disciplined practice, not a personality trait? What if every no became a Fortuitous No , and value was sold, not proclaimed ? What if systems turned bold dreams into repeatable wins—and legacy into design?

RECORDS.bookname: 谁比你更合适？健康傲气与大胆逐梦之道
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果自信不是一种性格特质，而是一项有纪律的修炼呢？如果每一次拒绝都是一次幸运的拒绝，价值是卖出来的，不是靠自我宣告呢？如果系统能把大胆的梦想变成可复制的胜利——把传承化为设计呢？

RECORDS.bookname: How to be Heard: Secrets for Powerful Speaking and Listening
RECORDS.bookabout: Ready to be heard? What if listening were trainable and your voice a toolbox ? Align content, delivery, and context for persuasion, while remembering speaking and listening constantly shape each other .

RECORDS.bookname: 如何让人听见你：有影响力的表达与倾听秘诀
RECORDS.bookabout: 准备好被听见了吗？如果倾听是可以训练的，而你的声音又是一整套工具，会怎样？为了更有说服力，让内容、表达方式与语境保持一致，同时记住，说与听始终在相互塑造。

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Encouragement: How to Lead Teams, Spread Love, and Serve from the Heart
RECORDS.bookabout: What if encouragement were a daily operating system rather than a pep talk? Could self-dialogue, character-first praise, steady care, authentic energy, and public elevation—anchored by service and reflection—unlock teams, families, and your own future?

RECORDS.bookname: 鼓励的艺术：如何带领团队、传递爱、以真心服务
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果把鼓励变成一套每天运行的操作系统，而不只是一时的打气，会怎样？以服务与反思为根基，自我对话、以品格为先的赞美、持续的关怀、真诚的能量、公开的肯定与提升，能否解锁团队、家庭，以及你的未来？

RECORDS.bookname: Words That Work: It's Not What You Say, It's What People Hear
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the right word could tilt trust, shift choices, and reshape memory without changing any facts? Want language that people actually hear—and act on? From rules to framing to testing, this guide shows how words work in real life.

RECORDS.bookname: 词语的力量：关键不在于你说什么，而在于别人听到什么
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个恰当的词，能在不改变任何事实的情况下，左右信任、改变选择、重塑记忆，会怎样？想要那种人们不仅听得进去、还会付诸行动的语言吗？这本指南从原则、框架到测试，展示了词语在现实世界中如何发挥作用。

RECORDS.bookname: Words Like Loaded Pistols: Rhetoric from Aristotle to Obama
RECORDS.bookabout: What if persuasion is less about facts than timing, tone, and shared assumptions? Want a toolkit of canons, structures, and figures—tested from Aristotle to Churchill, from courts to TV studios—that turns language into action? Curious how?

RECORDS.bookname: 言辞如上膛的手枪：从亚里士多德到奥巴马的修辞学
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果说服不是靠事实，而更取决于时机、语气和共同前提呢？想要一套把语言化为行动的工具箱吗？其中汇聚经典法则、结构与修辞格——从亚里士多德到丘吉尔、从法庭到电视演播室，皆已历经检验。好奇怎么做到吗？

RECORDS.bookname: If I Understood You, Would I Have This Look on My Face?: My Adventures in the Art and Science of Relating and Communicating
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wonder why clear facts still miss? What if listening could be trained like a muscle? Could improv sharpen empathy, align minds, and make ideas stick? From clinics to classrooms to home, it turns relating into reliable skill.

RECORDS.bookname: 如果我听懂你了，我还会有这副表情吗？：我在联结与沟通的艺术与科学中的探索之旅
RECORDS.bookabout: 你是否想过，为什么明明事实清清楚楚，却还是说不动人？如果倾听也能像肌肉一样训练呢？即兴表演能不能提升同理心、让彼此更同频、让想法更容易被记住？从诊室到课堂，再到家里，它都能把沟通与连接变成一项可靠的技能。

RECORDS.bookname: Humor, Seriously: Why Humor Is a Secret Weapon in Business and Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if levity isn't a distraction but a strategic edge? Could a well-placed joke boost trust, memory, and deals, while easing stress? Learn the brain mechanics, craft, workplace applications, cultural rituals, and guardrails that turn humor into repeatable leadership.

RECORDS.bookname: You Are a Badass at Making Money: Master the Mindset of Wealth
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of treating money like a moral verdict rather than moving energy? Curious how identity shifts, daily evidence rituals, and bold, specific action could flip scarcity into flow? Ready to build systems, resilience, and purpose-driven wealth that actually lasts?

RECORDS.bookname: 认真地幽默：为什么幽默是商业与生活的秘密武器

RECORDS.bookname: 你是赚钱高手：掌控财富心态

好奇自我认同的转变、每日的证据仪式，以及大胆而具体的行动，如何把匮乏翻转为丰盈的流动吗？
准备好构建真正持久的系统、韧性和使命驱动的财富了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: You Be You: Why Satisfaction and Success Are Closer Than You Think
RECORDS.bookabout: What if success isn't bigger stages but deeper faithfulness? What if your seat, voice, and gifts already suffice—right where you are? Ready to resist comparison, endure adversity, and bloom locally with communal rhythms?

RECORDS.bookname: 做你自己：为什么满足感与成功比你以为更近
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果成功不是更大的舞台，而是更深的忠诚呢？如果你所处的位置、你的声音和你的才干，早已足够——就在你所在之处？你是否准备好，拒绝比较，挺过逆境，并在社群的律动中，就地绽放？

RECORDS.bookname: You Deserve to Be Rich: Master the Inner Game of Wealth and Claim Your Future
RECORDS.bookabout: What if wealth starts with identity, not income? Could a clear baseline, automated cash flow, and simple investing turn discipline into freedom? Ready to heal money trauma, grow multiple incomes, and build a protective legacy that outlives you?

RECORDS.bookname: 你值得拥有财富：精通财富的内在之道，掌控你的未来

清晰的基准、自动化现金流和简单的投资，能否把自律化作自由？

RECORDS.bookname: Your Journey to Financial Freedom: A Step-by-Step Guide to Achieving Wealth and Happiness
RECORDS.bookabout: What if money served your life instead of stealing it? Could a simple Freedom Number, habit loops, and low-cost investing turn work optional? Learn to map milestones, protect risks, and design a purpose-filled everyday—sustainably, not someday.

RECORDS.bookname: 通往财务自由之路：实现财富与幸福的循序渐进指南

RECORDS.bookname: In Sheep's Clothing: Understanding and Dealing with Manipulative People

RECORDS.bookname: 披着羊皮的狼：理解并应对操纵型人格

RECORDS.bookname: Influence Is Your Superpower: The Science of Winning Hearts, Sparking Change, and Making Good Things Happen
RECORDS.bookabout: Want people to say yes without pressure? Curious how small asks, smart defaults, and a seven‑word question turn no into cooperation? Ready to defend against manipulation while building ethical charisma? Test one tiny experiment today and watch momentum grow.

RECORDS.bookname: 影响力是你的超能力：赢得人心、点燃改变、让好事发生的科学

RECORDS.bookname: Inner Excellence: Achieve Extraordinary Business Success through Mental Toughness
RECORDS.bookabout: What if peak performance isn't about talent but taming the self? Could Bushidō-like discipline, present-focused breathing, and emotional rehearsal turn pressure into resonance? Might growth-minded leadership—rooted in love, wisdom, and courage—unlock freedom, mastery, and meaningful success?

RECORDS.bookname: 内在卓越：通过心理韧性成就非凡的商业成功

RECORDS.bookname: How to Be a Failure and Still Live Well: A Philosophy

RECORDS.bookname: 如何失败却仍能好好生活：一种哲学

RECORDS.bookname: Lawyers, Liars, and the Art of Storytelling: Using Stories to Advocate, Influence, and Persuade

RECORDS.bookname: 律师、撒谎者与讲故事的艺术：用故事来辩护、影响与说服

在压力之下，品格、逻辑与情感该如何保持平衡？
叙事的剪裁与庭上的演绎，能改变判决吗？
法律拟制与像皮克斯那样的清晰明快，能否更有说服力？

RECORDS.bookname: The small BIG: small changes that spark big influence

Curious how 50 bite‑size, research‑backed shifts turn norms, commitment, credibility, and reciprocity into results across everyday decisions?  Small really becomes big.

RECORDS.bookname: 小之大：微小改变点燃巨大影响力

RECORDS.bookname: The Story Factor: Inspiration, Influence, and Persuasion through the Art of Storytelling

准备好把情感、隐喻与时机化为实用的领导力工具——同时守住伦理、做好准备了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Verbal Judo: The Gentle Art of Persuasion

RECORDS.bookname: 言语柔术：温和的说服艺术

RECORDS.bookname: The Warren Buffett Way

RECORDS.bookname: Renegade Marketing: 12 Steps to Building Unbeatable B2B Brands

RECORDS.bookname: Thank You for Arguing: What Aristotle, Lincoln, and Homer Simpson Can Teach Us About the Art of Persuasion

想把争执化为决策，在不哗众取宠的情况下赢得信任，并在陷阱尚未触发前就识破它们吗？
好奇时机、框架与故事的力量如何推动真正的选择吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The 3-Minute Rule: Say Less to Get More from Any Pitch or Presentation

RECORDS.bookname: 三分钟法则：少说多得，从任何推介或演示中获得更多

RECORDS.bookname: Spy the Lie: Former CIA Officers Teach You How to Detect Deception

RECORDS.bookname: 识破谎言：前中央情报局官员教你如何识别欺骗

RECORDS.bookname: The Charisma Myth: How Anyone Can Master the Art and Science of Personal Magnetism
RECORDS.bookabout: Can charisma be learned, switched on like a state, and tailored to any room? What if presence, power, and warmth—trained through psychology, body language, and habit—could amplify your influence in crises, negotiations, and everyday conversations? Ready to test it?

RECORDS.bookname: 魅力神话：任何人都能掌握个人魅力的艺术与科学

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Rhetoric
RECORDS.bookabout: What if persuasion were a civic science, not mere ornament? How do arguments, emotions, and character work together in courts, councils, and ceremonies? Why do style and structure steer judgement when facts alone cannot?

RECORDS.bookname: Speaker, Leader, Champion: Succeed at Work Through the Power of Public Speaking, featuring the prize-winning speeches of Toastmasters World Champions
RECORDS.bookabout: What if public speaking were a repeatable craft, not a mystery? Could one clear message, a lived story, sharp phrasing, and disciplined staging turn nerves into influence? Want tactics champions use—and ways to apply them at work tomorrow?

RECORDS.bookname: 演讲者、领导者、冠军：凭借公众演讲的力量在职场取得成功，特别收录多位国际演讲会世界冠军的获奖演讲

RECORDS.bookname: Stories for Work: The Essential Guide to Business Storytelling
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a 90‑second story outperformed slides? How can oxytocin, pacing, and disciplined detail shift decisions, build trust, and scale culture? Ready to turn everyday moments into repeatable influence across coaching, leadership, change, sales, and values?

RECORDS.bookname: 职场故事：商业叙事的必备指南
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一段90秒的故事，能胜过幻灯片，会怎样？催产素、节奏与克制的细节，如何改变决策、建立信任，并让文化得以规模化延展？准备好把日常时刻变成可复制的影响力，让它在教练、领导力、变革、销售与价值观中反复奏效了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Hidden Psychology of Social Networks: How Brands Create Authentic Engagement by Understanding What Motivates Us
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wonder why Reddit feels candid while Instagram invites display? Why meme formats outpace prose? How KPIs mislead, yet right-brain acts and left-brain stories align? Ready to map networks to identity layers, and build content that truly travels?

RECORDS.bookname: The Influential Mind: What the Brain Reveals About Our Power to Change Others
RECORDS.bookabout: Why do facts bounce off while emotions pierce? How do rewards, control, and social cues bend choices? Can technology steer habits without violating autonomy? Curious how minds update, resist, and spread ideas—and how to persuade ethically?

RECORDS.bookname: 心智的影响力：大脑揭示我们改变他人的力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么事实常常碰壁，而情绪却能直抵人心？奖励、控制以及社会线索如何左右我们的选择？科技能否在不侵犯自主性的前提下引导习惯？我好奇，人们的心智如何更新、抗拒并传播想法，以及如何做到合乎伦理的说服？

RECORDS.bookname: The Lost Art of Connecting: The Gather, Ask, Do Method for Building Meaningful Business Relationships
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of transactional networking? What if generosity were the metric? Could Gather–Ask–Do turn contacts into a living constellation—through hosting, clear asks, fast follow-ups, and gratitude—so your work and life finally reinforce each other rather than compete?

RECORDS.bookname: 联结的失传艺术：用“聚集,提问,行动”方法，建立有意义的商业关系
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了交易式的人脉往来吗？如果把慷慨作为衡量标准，会怎样？聚、问、做能否通过组织聚会、提出明确的请求、快速跟进和真诚的感谢，把人脉化作一座鲜活的星座，让你的工作与生活不再互相争夺，而是相得益彰？

RECORDS.bookname: Neuro-linguistic Programming For Dummies
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your inner map could be redrawn in minutes? What if language, attention, and physiology let you shift emotions, beliefs, and habits on demand? Curious how to coach, negotiate, and learn faster with practical, ethical tools?

RECORDS.bookname: 神经语言程序学入门
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的心智地图能在几分钟内重绘，会怎样？如果借助语言、注意力与生理状态，你能随时切换情绪、信念、习惯呢？想知道如何用实用、合乎伦理的工具，更快地进行教练、谈判与学习吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Power of Discipline: The Habit that will Change Your Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if discipline weren't duty but devotion that powers itself ? What if tiny starts activate the magic and reveal your how as you move ? And what if automatic habits delivered automatic success, guided by meaning ?

RECORDS.bookname: 自律的力量：将改变你人生的习惯
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果自律不再是义务，而是能自己生出动力的热忱呢？如果微小的起步就能激活魔力，让你在前行中看见该怎么做呢？如果那些自然而然的习惯，在意义的指引下，也能自然而然地带来成功呢？

RECORDS.bookname: POP!: Stand Out in Any Crowd
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of ideas drowning in noise? Want a one-sentence hook people can repeat, a voice that sounds unlike anyone else, and language that sparks action now? What if purpose, originality, and pith turned every message into momentum?

RECORDS.bookname: POP！在人群中脱颖而出
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了好点子被噪音淹没？想要一句人人都能复述的金句钩子、一种与众不同的声音，以及能立刻点燃行动的语言？如果把清晰的目的、原创性和言简意赅，化作每一条信息的前进动力，会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: The Science of Storytelling: Why Stories Make Us Human and How to Tell Them Better
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your brain is a prediction engine craving control, and stories are its training ground? How do status, flaws, and information gaps pull you through change toward meaning? Ready to model minds, ignite plots, and rewrite yourself?

RECORDS.bookname: 讲故事的科学：为什么故事塑造了人类，以及如何把故事讲得更好
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的大脑是一台渴望掌控的预测引擎，而故事就是它的训练场，会怎样？地位、缺陷与信息差，如何牵引你穿越变化，走向意义？准备好构建心智模型、点燃剧情、改写自我了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Presentation Secrets of Steve Jobs: How to Be Insanely Great in Front of Any Audience
RECORDS.bookabout: Want to turn slides into theater? This guide shows a three‑act method to frame stories, cast villains and heroes, and pace attention, while visuals, props, and rehearsed delivery create an experience that moves people to act—why not you?

RECORDS.bookname: 史蒂夫·乔布斯的演讲之道：如何在任何听众面前都能精彩绝伦
RECORDS.bookabout: 想把幻灯片演成一出戏吗？这本指南将教你用三幕式方法搭建故事框架、设定反派与英雄，并把握注意力的节奏；同时，借助视觉元素、道具和经过排练的演绎，打造一种促使人们采取行动的体验——为什么不是你？

RECORDS.bookname: Pitch Like Hollywood: What You Can Learn from the High-Stakes Film Industry
RECORDS.bookabout: Want to pitch like a filmmaker and persuade like a behavioral scientist? Curious how hooks, loglines, and three-act arcs meet defaults, framing, and priming—while taming stage fright? Ready for templates, live-room tactics, and debrief habits that compound wins?

RECORDS.bookname: 像好莱坞一样做提案：你能从成败攸关的电影业学到什么
RECORDS.bookabout: 想像电影人一样精彩陈述,又能像行为科学家一样具有说服力吗？好奇如何让钩子,一句话梗概,三幕结构与默认选项,框架效应,启动效应相互融合,同时克服怯场？准备好模板,现场战术,以及让胜利持续复利的复盘习惯了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Presentation Advantage: How to Inform and Persuade Any Audience
RECORDS.bookauthor: Kory Kogon / Breck England / Julie Schmidt
RECORDS.bookabout: What if every presentation were a decision? Could one promise, clean structure, and visual clarity change outcomes? Want tactics for room command, sharp openings, focused Q&A, and action-anchored closes? Ready to turn attention into commitment?

RECORDS.bookname: 演示优势：如何有效传达信息并说服任何听众
RECORDS.bookauthor: Kory Kogon / Breck England / Julie Schmidt
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果每一场演讲都是一次决策，会怎样？
一个承诺、干净的结构和清晰的视觉表达，能改变结果吗？
想要掌控全场、犀利开场、让问答更聚焦、以行动为导向收尾的技巧吗？
准备好把注意力转化为承诺了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Why Liberalism Failed
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the pursuit of autonomy births a stronger state? What if technology and schooling reshape freedom into dependency? Could elites thrive as citizenship withers—and might renewal begin in households, local exchange, and thick communities?

RECORDS.bookname: 自由主义为何失败
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果对自主的追求却孕育出了更强大的国家呢？如果科技与学校教育把自由重塑成依赖呢？当公民意识日渐式微时，精英阶层是否反而兴盛？而复兴是否会从家庭、本地交换与紧密的社群开始？

RECORDS.bookname: Whole Earth Discipline: Why Dense Cities, Nuclear Power, Transgenic Crops, Restored Wildlands, and Geoengineering Are Necessary
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the greenest tech is a city? What if nuclear, edited genes, and careful ecosystem gardening are not heresies but tools? Could evidence, not ideology, steer climate choices, and shared governance tame planetary risks while widening human possibility?

RECORDS.bookname: 全地球纪律：为什么高密度城市、核能、转基因作物、恢复荒野与地球工程是必要的
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果最绿色的技术是一座城市呢？如果核能、基因编辑和精心的生态养护不是异端，而是工具呢？能否让证据而非意识形态来引导气候抉择，并以共同治理驯服行星级风险，同时拓展人类的可能性？

RECORDS.bookname: Wonderful Tonight: George Harrison, Eric Clapton, and Me
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a model-turned-muse trades her career for love , becomes the unseen engine behind iconic songs , and watches fame corrode home life? Can spiritual rigor outrun addiction—and can photography  give her back a voice, a livelihood, a self?

RECORDS.bookname: 美妙今夜：乔治·哈里森、埃里克·克莱普顿与我
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一个从模特转身为缪斯的女人，为了爱情放弃事业，成为那些标志性歌曲的隐形推手，却又眼看名声腐蚀了家庭生活，会发生什么？坚定的精神修行能否战胜成瘾？而摄影，能否让她重新找回声音、生计与自我？

RECORDS.bookname: Never Lose a Customer Again: Turn Any Sale into Lifelong Loyalty in 100 Days
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever win a sale yet lose the relationship within 100 days? What if eight simple phases and four practical moves—backed by human touchpoints and empowering culture—could turn anxiety into momentum and customers into advocates? Ready to redesign day one?

RECORDS.bookname: 再也不流失客户：用100天把任何一次成交化为终身忠诚
RECORDS.bookabout: 有没有这样的经历：好不容易成交，却在100天内把客户关系弄丢了？要是有这样一套方法：八个简单阶段、四个实用动作，以人性化触点和赋能型文化为支撑，能把焦虑化作动能，把客户变成拥护者，会怎样？准备好重塑第一天了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: World Without Mind: The Existential Threat of Big Tech
RECORDS.bookabout: Is frictionless convenience quietly standardizing our thoughts? When platforms gatekeep news, books, and attention, who owns choice—us or the algorithms? What happens to writers, privacy, and democracy—and how might slow reading and civic rules reclaim the mind?

RECORDS.bookname: 没有思想的世界：科技巨头的生存威胁
RECORDS.bookabout: 无摩擦的便利是否在悄无声息地把我们的思想标准化？当平台为新闻、书籍和注意力把关时，选择权究竟归谁：我们，还是算法？作家、隐私与民主会走向何处？慢阅读与公民规则又能如何夺回我们的心智？

RECORDS.bookname: You Can Be a Stock Market Genius: Uncover the Secret Hiding Places of Stock Market Profits
RECORDS.bookabout: Think markets are efficient and pros unbeatable? Curious how spinoffs, rights offerings, merger spreads, bankruptcy rebounds, and option quirks hand edges to patient individuals? Want a step-by-step, incentive-driven playbook that favors odds over hype and homework over headlines?

RECORDS.bookname: 你也可以成为股市天才：发掘股市利润的秘密藏身处
RECORDS.bookabout: 你是否认为市场是有效的，专业人士不可战胜？是否好奇分拆、配股、并购价差、破产后的反弹以及期权的特殊之处，如何为耐心的个人投资者带来优势？是否想要一套循序渐进、以激励为导向的策略手册，重概率而非炒作，重研究而非头条？

RECORDS.bookname: You Can Do It Too!: Find Self Worth, Be Authentic and Heal Your Past
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your symptoms are messages? Can small daily choices rebuild self-worth? Through listening to body signals, changing habits, trusting guidance, integrating past wounds, and practicing surrender with intention, could healing become a grounded, creative way to live?

RECORDS.bookname: 你也能做到！找回自我价值，做真实的自己，疗愈你的过去
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的症状其实是在传递信息呢？每天那些微小的选择，能否重建自我价值？通过倾听身体的信号、改变习惯、信任内在引导、整合过去的伤痛，并且有意识地练习臣服，疗愈是否会成为一种脚踏实地、富有创造力的生活方式？

RECORDS.bookname: You Only Die Once: How to Make It to the End with No Regrets
RECORDS.bookabout: What if mortality were your sharpest coach? What if counting Mondays clarified priorities, regret became data, and habits obeyed purpose? Ready to widen time, brighten vitality, and draft a calling you'll actually practice—starting today?

RECORDS.bookname: 人只会死一次：如何在人生终点不留遗憾
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果把死亡当作你最锋利的教练，会怎样？
如果用“还剩多少个周一”来计数，让轻重缓急更清晰；把遗憾视作数据，让习惯服务于使命，又会怎样？
准备好把时间拉宽，把生命力点亮，并定下一个你会真正践行的使命——就从今天开始吗？

RECORDS.bookname: 13 Things Mentally Strong Women Don't Do: Own Your Power, Channel Your Confidence, and Find Your Authentic Voice for a Life of Meaning and Joy
RECORDS.bookabout: What if strength means refusing approval over values? Could vulnerability fuel progress? How would small experiments outperform perfectionism? Where do boundaries unlock influence? Ready to trade silence for strategic voice and lift others while growing yourself?

RECORDS.bookname: 心理强大的女性不做的13件事：掌控你的力量，驾驭你的自信，找到你真实的声音，成就有意义且充满喜悦的人生
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果强大的意义，是拒绝把认同置于价值观之上呢？
脆弱能否成为推动进步的燃料？
小小的试验如何胜过完美主义？
界限如何解锁影响力？
你是否准备好，用策略性的发声替代沉默，在自我成长的同时托举他人？

RECORDS.bookname: Don't Shoot the Dog!: The New Art of Teaching and Training
RECORDS.bookabout: What if behavior change didn't need scolding at all? What if tiny, well-timed rewards, crisp signals, and stepwise shaping could build skills, retire bad habits, and even reshape classrooms and offices? Curious how eight precise levers quietly run the show?

RECORDS.bookname: 别开枪打狗！教学与训练的新艺术
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果改变行为根本不需要责骂，会怎样？如果靠小而恰到好处的奖励、清晰的信号、一步步的塑造，就能提升技能、戒掉坏习惯，甚至重塑课堂和办公室呢？想知道那八个精准的杠杆如何在背后悄然掌控全局吗？

RECORDS.bookname: A Very Expensive Poison
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the murder weapon glowed unseen, turning teacups and hotel sinks into a map? What if science, not spies, traced a state's hand? Would a public inquiry, years later, reveal motive, method, and the chilling price of power?

RECORDS.bookname: 一剂非常昂贵的毒药
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果那件凶器在肉眼不可见的光里发亮，把茶杯和酒店的洗手池绘成一张地图，会怎样？如果揭露国家之手的，不是间谍，而是科学呢？多年之后的一场公开调查，能否揭示动机、手法，以及权力那令人不寒而栗的代价？

RECORDS.bookname: Committed: A Skeptic Makes Peace with Marriage
RECORDS.bookabout: What if marriage is less a romance than a civic contract with global consequences? When borders, visas, and family expectations press in, can two skeptical partners craft ritual, autonomy, and intimacy without losing themselves? Would legal realities ever outweigh private vows?

RECORDS.bookname: 承诺：一个怀疑论者与婚姻达成和解
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果婚姻与其说是浪漫，不如说是一份能牵动全球后果的民事契约，会怎样？当边境、签证和家族期待层层逼近，两位心存怀疑的伴侣能否在不迷失自我的前提下，打造属于他们的仪式感、自主与亲密？法律的现实，会不会有一天压过私人誓言？

RECORDS.bookname: The WEIRDest People in the World: How the West Became Psychologically Peculiar and Particularly Prosperous
RECORDS.bookabout: Could marriage bans and monogamy reshape minds, dissolve clans, and make strangers trustworthy?  Did towns, guilds, law, and literacy cultivate analytic thinking and long-range planning—yet also loneliness and tension—spreading unevenly worldwide and complicating development, democracy, and science's assumptions?

RECORDS.bookname: 世界上最奇特的人：西方如何在心理上变得与众不同并格外繁荣
RECORDS.bookabout: 婚姻禁令与一夫一妻制，是否能重塑思维、瓦解宗族，让人们能够信任陌生人？城镇、行会、法律与识字，是否既培育了分析性思维和长远规划能力，也带来了孤独与紧张，并且在全球传播不均，从而使我们对发展、民主与科学的基本假设变得更加复杂？

RECORDS.bookname: The Wizard of Menlo Park: How Thomas Alva Edison Invented the Modern World
RECORDS.bookabout: How did a near-anonymous telegrapher become a media-savvy "wizard," build invention factories, stage public trials, fumble radio, yet master branding? Isn't this a story of fame manufactured, technology commercialized, and myth outliving the man?

RECORDS.bookname: 门洛帕克的魔术师：托马斯·阿尔瓦·爱迪生如何创造现代世界
RECORDS.bookabout: 一个几乎默默无闻的电报员，如何摇身一变成了善于运用媒体的“奇才”，搭建发明工厂,策划公开试验,在无线电上失手,却精通品牌塑造？这不正是一段关于名望被制造,技术被商业化,神话超越其人的故事吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Accidental Presidents: Eight Men Who Changed America
RECORDS.bookabout: How do understudies become nation-shapers? What happens when death, scandal, and war thrust vice presidents into command? From Civil War ruptures to Gilded Age reforms and Cold War dilemmas, watch improvised succession forge precedent, policy, and unexpected leadership.

RECORDS.bookname: 意外总统：改变美国的八位男士
RECORDS.bookabout: 副手如何成为塑造国家的力量？当死亡、丑闻与战争把副总统推上掌权之位，会发生什么？从美国内战的撕裂，到镀金时代的改革，再到冷战的困局，且看仓促的继任如何铸就先例、重塑政策、成就意想不到的领导力。

RECORDS.bookname: The World That Wasn't: Henry Wallace and the Fate of the American Century
RECORDS.bookabout: How does a corn-breeding Iowan, equal parts empiricist and mystic, climb to the New Deal's inner circle, misread Stalin's East, clash with Truman, and bet a third party could reinvent America? And what did hidden Soviet channels mean all along?

RECORDS.bookname: 从未存在的世界：亨利·华莱士与美国世纪的命运
RECORDS.bookabout: 一个从事玉米育种的爱荷华人，既有实证精神也带着神秘气质，如何跻身新政的核心圈层、误读斯大林的东方阵营、与杜鲁门发生冲突，并押注第三党能够重塑美国？而那些隐藏的苏联渠道，到底一直意味着什么？

RECORDS.bookname: The Yellow House: A Memoir
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a vanished address still governs a life? How does water remember  while a city forgets, and a family rebuilds belonging from rituals, policy scripts, and rooms carried inside the body, long after 4121 Wilson keeps receiving mail ?

RECORDS.bookname: Arthur Ashe: A Life
RECORDS.bookabout: From segregated courts to a calculated Wimbledon ambush, from Cold War diplomacy to confronting apartheid, and from private illness to public truth, isn't this a study in agency under pressure, leadership under scrutiny, and legacy under construction? Read on.

RECORDS.bookname: 黄色的房子：一部回忆录
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一处不复存在的住址仍然主宰着一个人的一生，会怎样？城市在遗忘，水却仍然记得；即使很多年以后，威尔逊街4121号仍不断收到邮件，一个家庭又如何从仪式、政策规定，以及藏在身体里的那些房间中，重建归属感？

RECORDS.bookname: 阿瑟·阿什：一生
RECORDS.bookabout: 从种族隔离的球场，到在温布尔登网球锦标赛上精心策划的一次伏击；从冷战外交，到直面种族隔离制度；以及从个人的病痛，到公开的真相——这难道不是一部关于压力之下的主动性、审视之中的领导力、以及正在塑造的传承的研究吗？请往下看。

RECORDS.bookname: Think This, Not That: 12 Mindshifts to Breakthrough Limiting Beliefs and Become Who You Were Born to Be
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your biology follows belief, your identity is built on virtues, and tiny systems turn hard things effortless? What if relationships multiply growth and mission replaces quick dopamine hits? Ready to aim your life toward service, stamina, and meaning?

RECORDS.bookname: 要这样想，不要那样想：12个心态转变，突破限制性信念，成为你本该成为的自己
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的身体随你的信念而动，你的自我认同以美德为根基，微小的系统让难事变得毫不费力，会怎样？如果人际关系让成长倍增，而使命感取代那种迅速的多巴胺刺激，会怎样？你是否准备好，让你的人生指向服务、耐力与意义？

RECORDS.bookname: Thinking in Bets: Making Smarter Decisions When You Don't Have All the Facts
RECORDS.bookabout: What if every choice were a bet? Could calibration and dissent make you better in uncertainty? Would you trade outcomes for process, build red teams, time‑travel your mind, and precommit against tilt to decide well, learn faster, regret less?

RECORDS.bookname: 下注思维：当你没有全部事实时做出更聪明的决策
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果每一次选择都是一次下注，会怎样？校准与异议能让你在不确定性中更擅长应对吗？你会把关注点从结果转向过程，组建红队，让思维穿越时间，并事先承诺防止上头，从而更好地决策、更快地学习、更少后悔吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Uncommon: Simple Principles for an Extraordinary Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if greatness begins with breath and tiny commitments? What if five mountains—body, mind, emotions, intuition, spirit—unlock 20X capacity, reshape fear, and clarify purpose through visualization, teamwork, gut signals, and sacred silence? Ready to train, today?

RECORDS.bookname: 不凡：卓越人生的简单原则
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果伟大从呼吸与微小的承诺开始呢？如果这五座山峰——身体,心智,情感,直觉,精神——可以凭借可视化,团队协作,本能信号,神圣静默，解锁20倍潜能、重塑恐惧、明确使命，会怎样？你准备好从今天开始训练了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Triumph of the City: How Our Greatest Invention Makes Us Richer, Smarter, Greener, Healthier, and Happier
RECORDS.bookabout: Why do crowded streets forge richer lives, greener footprints, and faster ideas—even as they court crime, congestion, and soaring rents? Want to see how talent, transit, and smart pricing tilt the balance toward human flourishing?

RECORDS.bookname: 城市的胜利：我们最伟大发明如何让我们更富有、更聪明、更环保、更健康、更幸福
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么熙攘的街道能塑造更丰富的生活、更绿色的足迹、更快的点子——却也招致犯罪、拥堵和租金飙升？想看看人才、公共交通和智能定价如何把天平倾向人类的繁荣吗？

RECORDS.bookname: What You're Made For: Powerful Life Lessons from My Career in Sports
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your purpose is built in quiet routines, not dramatic moments ? What if reading is a moral duty and love your daily practice ? Will you win the day and lead through truthful service ?

RECORDS.bookname: 你生来要做什么：来自我体育生涯的深刻人生收获
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的使命是在安静的日常中筑成，而不是在那些戏剧性的时刻里呢？如果把阅读视为一种道德义务，把爱当作你的每日践行呢？你能否赢下今天，并以真诚的服务来引领？

RECORDS.bookname: When the Wolves Bite: Two Billionaires, One Company, and an Epic Wall Street Battle
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wonder how a Wall Street feud can rewrite a company's future? What happens when activist investors, live-TV battles, and regulators collide? Who truly wins when public narrative outmuscles spreadsheets, and culture, incentives, and law pull in opposite directions?

RECORDS.bookname: 当狼出击：两位亿万富豪、一家公司与一场华尔街的史诗之战
RECORDS.bookabout:
你是否想过，华尔街的一场纷争，会如何改写一家公司的未来？
当激进投资者、电视直播上的交锋与监管机构正面碰撞时，会发生什么？
当公众叙事的力量胜过了财务报表，而文化、激励与法律背道而驰、彼此拉扯时，谁才是真正的赢家？

RECORDS.bookname: Artificial Unintelligence: How Computers Misunderstand the World
RECORDS.bookabout: Think computers truly understand us? What if scores, maps, and assistants are just polished symbol shufflers? Want to see why newsroom audits, modeling, self‑driving dilemmas, and saying no at hackathons redraw the line between useful tools and misplaced faith?

RECORDS.bookname: 人工非智能：计算机如何误解世界
RECORDS.bookabout: 你觉得电脑真的懂我们吗？如果评分、地图和助手不过是精心包装的符号搬运工呢？想看看为什么新闻编辑部审计、建模、自动驾驶的两难困境，以及在黑客马拉松上说“不”，会重新划定有用工具与盲目信任之间的界线吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Beating the Street
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the smartest edge isn't prediction but patience? What if boredom, not adrenaline, signals value? Want a field guide that marries real fund war stories with checklists for banks, retailers, and utilities—and a repeatable stock-picking routine?

RECORDS.bookname: 战胜华尔街
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果最聪明的优势不是预测，而是耐心呢？如果真正预示价值的不是肾上腺素的冲动，而是无聊呢？想要一本把基金实战故事与针对银行、零售商、公用事业的检查清单相结合，并配上一套可重复的选股流程的实战指南吗？

RECORDS.bookname: American Prison: A Reporter's Undercover Journey into the Business of Punishment
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when incarceration becomes a business? Who profits when cells stay full and staff stay thin? Through undercover days on the tiers and a century-spanning ledger, this narrative tests power, race, austerity—and asks what real accountability would require.

RECORDS.bookname: 美国监狱：一名记者的卧底之旅，直击惩罚产业
RECORDS.bookabout: 当监禁被做成一门生意，会发生什么？当牢房长期满员、人手被压到最低时，谁在获利？通过卧底在监区楼层的那些日子与一本横跨百年的账本，这部叙事拷问权力、种族、紧缩——并追问要实现真正的问责究竟需要什么。

RECORDS.bookname: The Network State: How To Start a New Country
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a nation began in the cloud, counted citizens with cryptographic proofs, and only later bought land? Can protocols rival parties and papers? Ready to follow a founder from keyboard to recognition in a tripolar world?

RECORDS.bookname: 网络国家：如何创立一个新国家
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个国家从云端起步，用密码学证明来认证并统计公民，后来才去购置土地，会怎样？协议能与政党和报纸分庭抗礼吗？准备好在一个三极世界里，追随一位创始人，从键盘走向认可了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Outermost House: A Year of Life on the Great Beach of Cape Cod
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a year on a storm-swept dune became your strictest teacher? Could surf, fog, and migrating wings rewrite time, sharpen the senses, and reset ethics? Ready to trade haste for rhythm, noise for reverent attention?

RECORDS.bookname: 最外面的房子：在科德角大海滩的一年
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果在饱受风暴洗礼的沙丘上度过的一年，成了你最严厉的老师，会怎样？海浪,雾霭,迁徙的羽翼，能否改写时间，让感官更敏锐，重置伦理？你是否准备好，用节奏取代匆忙，用虔敬的专注取代喧嚣？

RECORDS.bookname: Biocentrism: How Life and Consciousness Are the Keys to Understanding the True Nature of the Universe
RECORDS.bookabout: What if reality isn't out there until we look? What if space and time are tools of perception, not cosmic scaffolds? Could life explain fine-tuning—and even recast death as an artifact of the mind's clock?

RECORDS.bookname: 生物中心论：生命与意识是理解宇宙真实本质的钥匙
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果现实只有在我们看见时才存在呢？如果空间与时间是感知的工具，而不是宇宙的框架呢？生命能否解释精细微调，甚至把死亡重塑为心灵时钟的产物？

RECORDS.bookname: The Path of the Law
RECORDS.bookabout: What if law is chiefly a forecast of courts, not a mirror of morality? How do history and policy steer doctrine? Why must jurists master economics, jurisprudence, and statistics? Ready to trade tidy syllogisms for transparent reasons and consequences?

RECORDS.bookname: 法律的道路
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果法律主要是对法院判决的预测，而不是道德的映照，会怎样？历史与政策如何塑造法律学说？为什么法学家必须精通经济学、法理学与统计学？你是否准备好用清晰的理由与后果，取代整齐划一的三段论？

RECORDS.bookname: The Power of Productivity: Wealth, Poverty, and the Threat to Global Stability
RECORDS.bookabout: What if prosperity hinges less on macro magic and more on gritty competition in shops, banks, and power grids? What if consumer interests, not producer lobbies, drive fair rules, better productivity, and shared gains? Curious how policy rewrites incentives?

RECORDS.bookname: 生产力的力量：财富、贫困与全球稳定的威胁
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果繁荣不再仰仗宏观层面的神奇手段，而是更多依靠商店、银行、电网里的实打实的竞争，会怎样？如果推动公平规则、更高生产率与共享收益的，是消费者的利益而非生产者的游说，又会怎样？好奇政策会如何重写激励吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Sentient Machine: The Coming Age of Artificial Intelligence
RECORDS.bookabout: Is intelligence only human, or can machines set their own aims and reshape cities, markets, and war? What if work decouples from meaning, privacy meets algorithmic power, and knowledge becomes our shared compass with self-amplifying minds at our side?

RECORDS.bookname: 具感机器：人工智能时代将至
RECORDS.bookabout: 智能是否只属于人类，还是说机器也能自行设定目标，进而重塑城市、市场与战争？如果工作与意义脱钩，隐私与算法权力相遇，而在自我增幅的心智相伴之下，知识成为我们共同的指南针，会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: Build for Tomorrow: An Action Plan for Embracing Change, Adapting Fast, and Future-Proofing Your Career
RECORDS.bookabout: What if disruption is fuel, not fire? Why panic when you can pause, adapt early, and test? Could failure be data, identity a portable why, and memory your ally—so the first time opens a door you wouldn't go back from?

RECORDS.bookname: 为明天而建：拥抱变化、快速适应、让你的职业经得起未来变化的行动计划
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果颠覆是燃料，而不是火焰，会怎样？既然可以先暂停、及早调整、并且试验，又何必恐慌？失败也许是数据，身份是一份可以随身携带的“为什么”，记忆是你的盟友——这样一来，第一次就能为你打开一扇让你不再回头的门吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Blitzed: Drugs in the Third Reich
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a regime banned drugs while secretly running on them? How did meth-fueled troops , pliant doctors, and an opioid-dependent ruler  shape strategy, society, and collapse—from Blitzkrieg wakefulness to bunker withdrawal and wartime contradictions that refused to fade ?

RECORDS.bookname: The Spider Network: The Wild Story of a Math Genius, a Gang of Backstabbing Bankers, and One of the Greatest Scams in Financial History
RECORDS.bookabout: How does a daily survey morph into a market's steering wheel—and a crime scene? Who profits from tiny tweaks, and who pays when trust erodes? Follow traders, brokers, and regulators as incentives, culture, and law collide across continents and years.

RECORDS.bookname: 嗑药的纳粹：第三帝国的毒品史
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个政权一边禁毒，暗地里却靠毒品维持运作，会怎样？服用冰毒的部队、唯命是从的医生、对阿片类药物依赖的统治者，又如何塑造了战略、社会以及最终的崩溃——从闪电战的亢奋清醒，到地堡里的戒断与退缩，再到挥之不去的战时矛盾？

RECORDS.bookname: 蜘蛛网：一位数学天才、一群背后捅刀的银行家，以及金融史上最重大的骗局之一的离奇故事
RECORDS.bookabout: 一项每日调查如何摇身一变，成了市场的方向盘——又如何沦为犯罪现场？谁从小小的改动中获利，而当信任被侵蚀时，又是谁来买单？跟随交易员、经纪人和监管者，见证激励、文化与法律在跨越各大洲与多年时光中的激烈碰撞。

RECORDS.bookname: The Strange Death of Europe: Immigration, Identity, Islam
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a continent questioned its own story while inviting the world in? What happens when borders blur, welfare strains, speech shrinks, and faith resurges? Could confidence, law, and assimilation still stitch together a coherent future?

RECORDS.bookname: 欧洲的奇异之死：移民,身份,伊斯兰
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果一块大陆一边把世界迎进来，一边开始质疑自己的故事，会怎样？
当边界模糊、福利承压、言论空间收缩、信仰回潮，会发生什么？
信心、法治与同化还能把一个连贯的未来缝合起来吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Synthetic Age: Outdesigning Evolution, Resurrecting Species, and Reengineering Our World
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when evolution becomes editable, ecosystems are redesigned, and the planet itself turns into a managed project? Could quick fixes outpace wisdom? Who decides the limits? This book asks whether power without humility can remake our shared home.

RECORDS.bookname: 合成时代：超越进化、复活物种、重塑我们的世界
RECORDS.bookabout: 当进化变得可编辑、生态系统被重新设计、整颗星球化作一项被管理的工程时，会发生什么？权宜之计会不会快过智慧？谁来划定界限？这本书追问：没有谦卑的权力能否重塑我们共同的家园？

RECORDS.bookname: The Upside of Inequality: How Good Intentions Undermine the Middle Class
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the real bottleneck isn't money but risk‑bearing talent? What if top earners expand, not drain, opportunity? Ready to rethink redistribution, education's slow clock, and policies that widen innovation's pipeline while lifting jobs and wages?

RECORDS.bookname: 不平等的好处：善意如何削弱中产阶级
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果真正的瓶颈不是资金，而是能够承担风险的人才呢？如果高收入者不是减少机会，而是扩大机会呢？你准备好重新思考再分配、教育的慢时钟，以及那些既能拓宽创新渠道又能提升就业和工资的政策了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Heart of a Woman
RECORDS.bookabout: Is motherhood a private refuge or a training ground for courage? From Westlake streets to Harlem offices, Cairo newsrooms to Accra hospitals, how does one voice braid art, activism, and survival—and keep choosing freedom when love and history demand otherwise?

RECORDS.bookname: 女人的心
RECORDS.bookabout: 做母亲，是一处私人的避风港，还是锻造勇气的训练场？从韦斯特莱克的街头到哈莱姆的办公室，从开罗的新闻编辑部到阿克拉的医院，一个声音如何把艺术、行动主义与生存编织在一起——并且当爱与历史要求你走向另一条路时，仍一次次选择自由？

RECORDS.bookname: The Heartbeat of Wounded Knee: Native America from 1890 to the Present
RECORDS.bookabout: Is this really a story of disappearance—or of people remaking life after 1890 through family, service, law, enterprise, and media ? What if survival, not ruin, reframes America itself, from Wounded Knee's myth  to Standing Rock's livestreams ?

RECORDS.bookname: 伤膝河的心跳：1890年至今的美洲原住民
RECORDS.bookabout: 这真的是一个关于消逝的故事，还是一个关于人们在1890年之后通过家庭,服务,法律,企业,媒体重塑生活的故事？如果重塑美国本身的不是毁灭，而是生存，会怎样？如果美国的叙事从伤膝河的神话转向斯坦丁罗克的直播，又意味着什么？

RECORDS.bookname: The Moth Presents All These Wonders: True Stories About Facing the Unknown
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the bravest act is telling the plain truth, live, without notes? Could vulnerability stitch strangers into a community? Might science, grief, and forgiveness share a single pulse? Ready to hear ordinary lives turn uncertainty into wonder?

RECORDS.bookname: 飞蛾呈现：这些奇迹——关于直面未知的真实故事
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果最勇敢的举动，是在现场不看稿，直说真话呢？脆弱能否把陌生人连成一个共同体？科学、悲痛与宽恕，是否源于同一股脉动？准备好听平凡人生如何把不确定化作惊奇了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Myth of the Rational Voter: Why Democracies Choose Bad Policies
RECORDS.bookabout: Think voters always pick what's best? What if comforting beliefs beat facts at the ballot box? Meet four stubborn biases, see how politicians and media weaponize them, and weigh practical fixes—from rules and markets to better economic literacy.

RECORDS.bookname: 理性选民的神话：为什么民主会选出糟糕的政策
RECORDS.bookabout: 你以为选民总能做出最优选择吗？如果在投票时，让人心安的信念击败了事实，会怎样？来认识四种顽固的偏见，看看政客和媒体如何把它们当成武器，并权衡一些务实的解决之道——从规则与市场，到更好的经济素养。

RECORDS.bookname: The Measure of a Man: A Spiritual Autobiography
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a childhood without mirrors forged a self before race had power , and a near-drowning reset life's ledger in Acapulco ? What if legacy meant only love, work, and family—measured through choices on and off the stage ?

RECORDS.bookname: 衡量一个人：心灵自传
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个没有镜子的童年，在种族还没有力量之前就塑造了自我，而在阿卡普尔科的一次溺水险情又让人生的账本归零，会怎样？如果所谓的传承只是爱,工作,家庭——以你在台上与台下的选择来衡量呢？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Caregiving: How to Lend Support and Encouragement to Those with Cancer
RECORDS.bookabout: What if caregiving isn't about fixing, but presence and patient empowerment? How do silence, micro-goals, and gentle rituals ease pain? Could room design, honest language, and boundaries restore dignity—and even reshape the caregiver's identity along the way?

RECORDS.bookname: 照护的艺术：如何为癌症患者提供支持与鼓励
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果照护的核心不在于解决问题，而在于陪伴与赋能患者，会怎样？沉默、微目标与温柔的小仪式，如何减轻痛苦？房间的设计、坦诚的语言与清晰的边界，能否恢复尊严，甚至在这个过程中重塑照护者的身份认同？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Asking: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Let People Help
RECORDS.bookabout: What if asking weren't begging but collaboration? Could coins and flowers teach economics of trust? How do stage, internet, and home reveal the same circuit—ask, give, receive—turning audiences into communities and vulnerability into shared power?

RECORDS.bookname: 求助的艺术：我如何学会不再担忧，并让人们来帮忙
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果开口不是乞求，而是协作，会怎样？硬币与鲜花能否教会我们信任的经济学？舞台、互联网与家中如何揭示同一个循环——请求,给予,接受——把观众变成社群，把脆弱化作共享的力量？

RECORDS.bookname: It Starts with the Egg: How the Science of Egg Quality Can Help You Get Pregnant Naturally, Prevent Miscarriage, and Improve Your Odds in IVF
RECORDS.bookabout: What if you could improve your fertility with simple lifestyle changes? Could small adjustments in diet, supplements, and toxin exposure really enhance egg quality? What if better egg health could significantly increase your chances of a successful pregnancy?

RECORDS.bookname: 从卵子开始：卵子质量科学如何帮助你自然怀孕、预防流产并提高试管受精成功率
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果通过简单的生活方式改变就能改善生育能力，你会怎么想？饮食、补充剂和毒素暴露的微小调整，真的能够提升卵子质量吗？如果更好的卵子健康能大幅提高怀孕成功的几率，你会考虑这样做吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Positive Thinking: Eliminate Negative Thinking I Emotional Intelligence I Stop Overthinking: A Self Help Book to Developing Mindfulness and Overcoming Negative Thoughts
RECORDS.bookabout: Can everyday moods become teachable moments? What if two-minute mindfulness , gratitude journaling , and neuroplasticity-backed affirmations  turned distorted thoughts into balanced action, while EQ helped process—not suppress—feelings  and steady relationships through chaos? Ready to build optimistic realism that lasts?

RECORDS.bookname: 积极思维的艺术：消除消极思维、情商、停止过度思考——一本帮助你培养正念并克服消极想法的自助读物
RECORDS.bookabout: 日常的情绪，能变成可供学习的契机吗？若用两分钟的正念练习、感恩日记和基于神经可塑性的自我肯定，把扭曲的念头化为更平衡的行动；同时借助情商去处理而非压抑情绪，并在混乱中稳住关系，会怎样？准备好建立一种持久的乐观现实主义了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Autonomous Revolution: Reclaiming the Future We've Sold to Machines
RECORDS.bookabout: Is this merely another industrial chapter, or a phase change? How do personal agents, platforms, and algorithms reshape work, power, and fairness? Can governance, law, and distribution catch up fast enough to keep autonomy aligned with human purpose?

RECORDS.bookname: 自主革命：夺回我们卖给机器的未来
RECORDS.bookabout: 这只是产业史上的又一章，还是一次质变？个人智能体、平台与算法将如何重塑工作、权力与公平？治理、法律与分配能否以足够快的速度跟上，让自主性始终与人类的目的保持一致？

RECORDS.bookname: The Broken Ladder: How Inequality Affects the Way We Think, Live, and Die
RECORDS.bookabout: What if inequality doesn't just empty wallets but rewires minds? Why do status cues bend memory, stress, and time horizons, ripple into politics and justice, and even shorten lives—and what practical levers can loosen that grip?

RECORDS.bookname: 破碎的阶梯：不平等如何影响我们的思维、生活与死亡
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果不平等不仅掏空钱袋，还会重塑心智，会怎样？为什么地位信号会扭曲我们的记忆、压力水平与时间视野，层层扩散到政治与司法，甚至缩短寿命？又有哪些切实可行的抓手能松动这种钳制？

RECORDS.bookname: The Book of Awakening: Having the Life You Want by Being Present to the Life You Have
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wondered if presence can turn pain into wisdom, or if slowing down might actually move you forward? What if kindness is a practical skill, vulnerability a strength, and trust the bridge where inner truth meets a shared, living world?

RECORDS.bookname: 觉醒之书：专注当下，活出你想要的人生
RECORDS.bookabout: 你是否曾想过，专注于当下能否把痛苦化作智慧？放慢脚步，是否反而会让你更向前？如果善意是一种实用的技能，脆弱是一种力量，而信任是一座桥，连接内在的真实与这个共同而鲜活的世界，会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: The Education of an Idealist: A Memoir
RECORDS.bookabout: Could witnessing turn to policy? What happens when moral courage meets bureaucracy? From Irish childhood to war zones, campaigns, the West Wing, and the UN, can empathy steer drones, votes, and visas? And what does idealism become after Aleppo—and home?

RECORDS.bookname: 理想主义者的教育：回忆录
RECORDS.bookabout: 见证能否化作政策？当道德勇气遭遇官僚体系，会发生什么？从爱尔兰的童年到战区、竞选、白宫西翼与联合国，同理心能否引导无人机、选票和签证？而在经历了阿勒颇、回到家之后，理想主义会变成什么？

RECORDS.bookname: The Happiness Project, Tenth Anniversary Edition: Or, Why I Spent a Year Trying to Sing in the Morning, Clean My Closets, Fight Right, Read Aristotle, and Generally Have More Fun
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wonder if happiness can be engineered rather than hoped for? What if checkmarks, tiny experiments, and kinder conversations rewired your days? Could play, money choices, and a dash of awe turn ordinary routines into a sustainable, self-made flourishing?

RECORDS.bookname: 幸福计划，十周年纪念版：或者，为什么我花了一年时间，试着在早晨唱歌、整理衣柜、好好吵架、阅读亚里士多德，并总体上更开心
RECORDS.bookabout: 你有没有想过，幸福能不能被设计出来，而不是只靠盼望？如果用一个个勾选、小小的实验、以及更友善的对话，就能重塑你的每一天，会怎样？玩乐、理财选择，再加上一点点惊叹，能否把普通的日常变成可持续、由自己亲手打造的繁盛？

RECORDS.bookname: The Fourth Age: Smart Robots, Conscious Computers, and the Future of Humanity
RECORDS.bookabout: Is the future shaped by knowledge—or by our beliefs about minds, machines, and free will?  Will robots take all jobs, some, or none?  Can consciousness be built or uploaded?  Ready for a 100,000‑year tour of technology and meaning?

RECORDS.bookname: 第四次时代：智能机器人、有意识的计算机与人类的未来
RECORDS.bookabout:
未来是由知识塑造，还是由我们对心智、机器与自由意志的信念所塑造？
机器人会取代所有岗位、部分岗位，还是一个也取代不了？
意识能被构建，或者被上传吗？
准备好踏上横跨十万年的技术与意义之旅了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Security Analysis: Sixth Edition, Foreword by Warren Buffett
RECORDS.bookabout: Think markets reward quick charts and perfect timing? What if value hides in mispriced bonds, obscure equities, and structures that shift wealth? Ready to use disciplined comparisons, margins of safety, and patient rules instead of forecasts and hype?

RECORDS.bookname: 证券分析：第六版，沃伦·巴菲特作序
RECORDS.bookabout: 你以为市场会奖赏速成图表和完美的择时吗？如果价值藏在定价错误的债券、冷门股票，以及能转移财富的结构安排里呢？你是否准备好，用有纪律的比较、安全边际和耐心的准则，取代预测与炒作？

RECORDS.bookname: The Serengeti Rules: The Quest to Discover How Life Works and Why It Matters
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the same few rules steer cells, predators, and entire landscapes? What if disease and ecological collapse are both failures of feedback—and recovery, a matter of restoring brakes and accelerators? Ready to test nature's playbook?

RECORDS.bookname: 塞伦盖蒂法则：探寻生命如何运作以及为何重要
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果同样的几条规则能够同时引导细胞、捕食者乃至整片景观，会怎样？如果疾病与生态崩塌归根到底都是反馈机制失灵，而恢复的关键在于把刹车与加速器重新装回去，会怎样？准备好按自然的剧本来试一试了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Six Thinking Hats
RECORDS.bookabout: What if meetings stopped being battles and became synchronized shifts of perspective? Curious how color-coded roles separate facts, feelings, risks, and ideas to design better choices faster? Ready to test a minute-long emotions sweep?

RECORDS.bookname: 六顶思考帽
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果会议不再针锋相对，而是同步切换视角，会怎样？你是否好奇，如何用颜色标注的角色分工，把事实、感受、风险和想法分门别类，从而更快做出更好的选择？准备好试一试一分钟的情绪扫描了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Shattered: Inside Hillary Clinton's Doomed Campaign
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a campaign with money, data, and pedigree misplaces its reason for running? When analytics mute field warnings, and October shocks meet a fragile narrative? Want to see how small fractures become election-night collapse?

RECORDS.bookname: 破碎：希拉里·克林顿注定失败的竞选内幕
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一场资金充裕、数据齐备、背景深厚的竞选，忘了自己为什么要参选，会发生什么？当数据分析让一线预警失声，十月惊奇撞上本就脆弱的叙事，又会如何？想看看微小的裂缝如何在选举之夜酿成全面崩塌吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Stalingrad: The Fateful Siege: 1942-1943
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a city becomes both prize and trap? When factory floors turn into fortresses, snipers rewrite tactics, and an airlift promises salvation yet delivers famine? Who truly commands—maps, fear, or hunger—and why did surrender outlive heroics?

RECORDS.bookname: 斯大林格勒：命运攸关的围城，1942—1943
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一座城市既是战利品又是陷阱时，会发生什么？当工厂车间化作堡垒，狙击手改写战术，而空运许诺拯救却带来饥荒？真正主宰的是地图、恐惧，还是饥饿——又为何投降比英勇更能延续？

RECORDS.bookname: Solve for Happy: Engineer Your Path to Joy
RECORDS.bookabout: What if happiness isn't earned but uncovered—by subtracting illusions, debugging blind spots, and anchoring attention in now? Could grief, love, and simple rules become a reliable system? Ready to test an engineer's path to lasting joy?

RECORDS.bookname: 解答快乐：用工程师的方法走向喜悦
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果快乐不是靠争取而来，而是通过剔除幻象、排查盲点、让注意力安住当下，一点点被揭开呢？悲伤、爱与简单的规则，能否成为一套可靠的系统？准备好试验一条工程师式的通往持久喜悦的路径了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: That Bird Has My Wings: The Autobiography of an Innocent Man on Death Row
RECORDS.bookabout: What if anger became a teacher, prison a classroom, and a boy's hunt for belonging the map? Can rules save you or only contain you? When wings are taken, does flight begin on yard, in silence, or in memory?

RECORDS.bookname: 那只鸟有我的翅膀：一位无辜死囚的自传
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果愤怒成了老师，监狱成了课堂，一个男孩对归属的追寻成了地图，会怎样？规则能救你，还是只会把你圈住？当翅膀被夺走时，飞行会在操场上、在沉默中，还是在记忆里开始？

RECORDS.bookname: The 5 A.M. Miracle: Dominate Your Day Before Breakfast
RECORDS.bookabout: What if one pre-dawn decision could redirect your entire year? Could a quarterly rhythm, a handful of anchor habits, and ruthless reviews move grand goals from someday to breakfast? Ready to test whether mornings are your unfair advantage?

RECORDS.bookname: 清晨5点的奇迹：早餐前掌控你的一天
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果黎明前的一次决定，能改写你整整一年的走向，会怎样？按季度的节奏，配上几项锚定习惯，再加上毫不留情的复盘，能不能把宏大的目标从“总有一天”，变成清晨就能推进的事？准备好来验证一下，早晨是否是你的不公平优势了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The 12 Traits of the Greats: Mastering The Qualities Of Uncommon Achievers
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wondered if greatness is teachable rather than gifted? What if ownership, passion, focused action, and flexible grit could be trained, then multiplied through character, relationships, wisdom, and generosity? Ready to test these daily disciplines in your own life?

RECORDS.bookname: 伟大者的12个特质：掌握非凡成就者的品质
RECORDS.bookabout: 你可曾想过，伟大是可以后天习得的，而不是天生的？如果主人翁意识,热情,专注行动,灵活的坚韧能够通过训练培养出来，并且还能借由品格,人际关系,智慧,慷慨加倍放大，会怎样？准备好在自己的生活中试一试这些日常修炼了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: One Simple Idea: Turn Your Dreams into a Licensing Goldmine While Letting Others Do the Work
RECORDS.bookabout: Why build a company when you can rent your ideas? What if a one-page sheet, a $110 PPA, and a few calls secured royalties? Ready to design for shelves, negotiate smart, and let compounding relationships pay you?

RECORDS.bookname: 一个简单的创意：让别人替你做事，把梦想变成授权金矿
RECORDS.bookabout:
当你可以把创意出租时，何必再去创办公司？
如果只靠一页纸的提案、一份110美元的临时专利申请，再加几通电话，就能敲定版税呢？
准备好为货架而设计、聪明谈判，并让人脉的复利给你持续回报了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Paper Belt on Fire: How Renegade Investors Sparked a Revolt Against the University
RECORDS.bookabout: Is progress actually stalling, and are crumbling institutions the culprit? What if funding outsiders—dropouts, teenage builders, unconventional founders—beats credentialism to restart innovation? Follow a blueprint for replacing failing systems and tackling energy, transport, health, and water next.

RECORDS.bookname: 燃烧的文凭带：叛逆投资者如何点燃针对大学的反叛
RECORDS.bookabout: 进步是否真的在停滞，摇摇欲坠的机构是不是罪魁祸首？如果把资金投向局外人——辍学生,少年创客,非传统创业者——是否会胜过资历崇拜，从而重启创新？依循一套替换失灵系统的蓝图，下一步攻克能源,交通,健康,水资源。

RECORDS.bookname: Private Truths, Public Lies: The Social Consequences of Preference Falsification
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your public stance isn't yours at all? How do hidden thresholds, reputational trade-offs, and censored talk forge stable illusions—until a nudge unleashes cascades, topples regimes, and rewrites policies? Could silence itself be the loudest signal?

RECORDS.bookname: 私人真相，公共谎言：偏好伪装的社会后果
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的公开立场根本不属于你，会怎样？隐藏的阈值、声誉取舍、被审查的言论，如何塑造出稳定的假象——直到一个轻微的推动引发连锁效应、推翻政权、改写政策？沉默本身会不会是最响亮的信号？

RECORDS.bookname: Plants of the Gods: Their Sacred, Healing, and Hallucinogenic Powers
RECORDS.bookabout: What if plants were libraries of consciousness—teaching, healing, and reshaping identity? Could rituals double as pharmacology, and clinics borrow from temples? From mescaline cacti to ergot and iboga, might culture and chemistry be one intertwined story?

RECORDS.bookname: 众神之植物：它们的神圣、疗愈与致幻力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果植物是意识的图书馆——能教导、疗愈、重塑认同，会怎样？仪式能否兼具药理作用，诊所又能否借鉴寺庙？从麦司卡林仙人掌到麦角与伊波加，文化与化学会不会其实是一段交织成一体的故事？

RECORDS.bookname: Quality of Earnings: The Investor's Guide to How Much Money A Company is Really Making
RECORDS.bookabout: What if headline profits are just theater, and only cash tells the truth? Could receivables, inventory, and policy shifts betray the plot? Want a toolkit to test quality, spot manipulation, and judge industries on their own terms?

RECORDS.bookname: 收益质量：投资者指南——公司到底赚了多少钱
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果财报里的亮眼利润不过是一出戏，而只有现金才说真话呢？应收账款、存货、政策变动，会不会暴露剧情的破绽？想要一套工具，去检验质量、识别操纵，并按各行业的自身逻辑作出判断吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Rewire: Break the Cycle, Alter Your Thoughts and Create Lasting Change
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your brain is hardware you can upgrade and your story software you can rewrite?  Want tools to calm stress, revise beliefs, metabolize grief, and rebuild habits with sleep, movement, and dopamine wisdom—so you can create yourself?

RECORDS.bookname: 重塑大脑：打破循环，改变思维，创造持久改变
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的大脑是一块可升级的硬件，而你的人生故事是一套可重写的软件，会怎样？你是否想要一些工具，来缓解压力、更新信念、把悲伤代谢掉，并借助睡眠、运动和多巴胺的智慧重塑习惯——从而塑造你自己？

RECORDS.bookname: Saving Aziz: How the Mission to Help One Became a Calling to Rescue Thousands from the Taliban
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a mission of revenge becomes a vow to protect? When bureaucracy fails, can improvised alliances outpace collapsing states? How far can trust between two families stretch—across checkpoints, airlifts, and winters—until it restructures what rescue truly means?

RECORDS.bookname: 拯救阿齐兹：援助一人的使命如何成为拯救成千上万人脱离塔利班的呼召
RECORDS.bookabout:
当复仇的使命化作守护的誓言，会发生什么？
当官僚体系失灵，临时结盟能否比崩塌中的国家更快行动？
两个家庭之间的信任，能延展到多远——跨越哨卡、空运与寒冬——直到重塑救援的真正意义？

RECORDS.bookname: Rise of the Machines: A Cybernetic History
RECORDS.bookabout: What if feedback loops, born in wartime fire-control, now govern economies, bodies, and networks? Can automation's promise, cybernetic dreams, and cryptographic rebellions coexist with drones, surveillance, and hackable systems—or are we steering while being steered?

RECORDS.bookname: 机器崛起：控制论史
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果那些诞生于战时火控的反馈回路，如今主宰着经济、身体和网络，会怎样？自动化的承诺、控制论的梦想与加密的反叛，能否与无人机、监控和可被攻破的系统共存——抑或我们一面操纵方向，一面被操纵？

RECORDS.bookname: Say It Well: Find Your Voice, Speak Your Mind, Inspire Any Audience
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your best line was written first? What if audience research shaped every slide, story, and pause? Want a practical playbook for structure, delivery, Q&A, and crisis moments? Ready to turn ideas into action people remember?

RECORDS.bookname: 好好说话：找到你的声音，畅所欲言，激励任何听众
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果你从那句最精彩的话写起，会怎样？
如果受众研究能塑造每一页幻灯片、每一个故事、每一次停顿，会怎样？
想要一套涵盖结构、表达、问答与危机时刻的实用作战手册吗？
准备好把想法化为让人记住的行动了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Secrets of Power Negotiating: Inside Secrets from a Master Negotiator
RECORDS.bookabout: Want to outmaneuver without hostility? Curious how small cues, silence, and timing shift deals your way? Ready to test Gambits, counter tricks, and lock agreements that actually stick across cultures? Why guess when you can negotiate with intention?

RECORDS.bookname: 权力谈判的秘密：谈判大师的内部秘笈
RECORDS.bookabout: 想在不带敌意的情况下巧妙制胜？好奇小小的暗示、沉默与时机如何让交易向你倾斜？准备好试试策略招数、反制技巧，并敲定在不同文化中也能真正站得住的协议吗？既然可以带着明确意图去谈判，何必猜测？

RECORDS.bookname: Margin of Safety: Risk-Averse Value Investing Strategies for the Thoughtful Investor
RECORDS.bookabout: What if risk isn't volatility but the chance of permanent loss? What if patience, cash, and catalysts beat forecasts and fads? Want to see how disciplined research turns market errors into asymmetric, repeatable gains?

RECORDS.bookname: 安全边际：有思想的投资者的风险规避型价值投资策略
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果风险不是波动性，而是永久性损失的可能性呢？如果耐心、现金和催化剂能胜过预测与潮流呢？想看看有章法的研究如何把市场错误转化为非对称、可重复的回报吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Mistakes I Made at Work: 25 Influential Women Reflect on What They Got Out of Getting It Wrong
RECORDS.bookabout: What if failure were your most practical teacher? What if careers grew from asking, saying no, and telling your own story out loud? Here, 25 leaders turn missteps into playbooks on negotiation, resilience, and credible change .

RECORDS.bookname: 我在工作中犯过的错：25位有影响力的女性反思她们从犯错中得到的收获
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果失败是你最实用的老师，会怎样？如果职业成长源于敢问、敢拒、敢把自己的故事公开讲出来，又会怎样？在这里，25位领导者把失误化作关于谈判,韧性,可信的变革的行动手册。

RECORDS.bookname: Momentum: 13 Ways to Unlock Your Potential
RECORDS.bookabout: What if momentum isn't luck, but a system? What if tiny, value-aligned experiments outpace grand plans? Ready to rewire fear, simplify choices, and turn purpose into daily defaults that compound? Then why postpone your next small, decisive step?

RECORDS.bookname: 动能：13种解锁你潜能的方法
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果势头不是运气，而是一套系统呢？如果那些微小、与价值观一致的试验，能跑赢宏大的计划呢？准备好重塑你与恐惧的关系，简化选择，把目标变成每天的默认模式，并让它们持续产生复利了吗？那又何必再拖延你下一个小而果断的行动？

RECORDS.bookname: More from Less: The Surprising Story of How We Learned to Prosper Using Fewer Resources and What Happens Next
RECORDS.bookabout: Can prosperity rise while material use falls? What if competition, technology, public pressure, and smart rules shrink pollution and resource demand? Through data, case studies, and bold policy ideas, this narrative argues we're learning to get more from less.

RECORDS.bookname: 以少胜多：我们如何用更少的资源获得繁荣的惊人故事，以及接下来会发生什么
RECORDS.bookabout: 当物质消耗下降时，繁荣能否提升？如果竞争、技术、公众压力和更明智的规则能够缩减污染与资源需求，会怎样？通过数据、案例研究以及大胆的政策构想，这段论述认为，我们正在学会以更少获得更多。

RECORDS.bookname: More Money Than God: Hedge Funds and the Making of a New Elite
RECORDS.bookabout: What if finance's real innovations came from rule-bending outsiders testing ideas with their own money? How did contrarian bets, shorting, and quant signals reshape crises, risk, and reward? Want a tour from origins to today's adaptive, process-driven edge?

RECORDS.bookname: 比上帝还富：对冲基金与新精英的崛起
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果金融领域真正的创新，其实来自那些打破常规、用自己的钱检验想法的局外人，会怎样？逆向押注、做空与量化信号，又是如何重塑危机、风险与回报的格局？想不想来一场自起源至今、见证自适应、流程驱动优势崛起的全景之旅？

RECORDS.bookname: Mountains Beyond Mountains
RECORDS.bookabout: Is global health just policy memos, or a trail from a Haitian village to Peruvian hillsides and Russian prisons? What if curing TB and AIDS demands cash stipends, second-line drugs, and stubborn solidarity—proving systems can change?

RECORDS.bookname: 山外有山
RECORDS.bookabout:
全球健康，难道只是几份政策备忘录，还是一段从海地的村庄走到秘鲁的山坡、再到俄罗斯监狱的实地历程？

如果治愈结核病和艾滋病，需要现金津贴、二线药物，以及顽强的团结——从而证明体系是可以改变的，又会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: No Future Without Forgiveness
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a nation chose truth over silence and repair over revenge? Could public confession, conditional amnesty, and shared mourning reset history's compass? Who carries the cost of mercy, and how do victims reclaim dignity without forgetting?

RECORDS.bookname: 没有宽恕就没有未来
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个国家选择真相而非沉默，选择修复而非复仇，会怎样？公开忏悔、有条件的特赦与共同哀悼，能否重新校准历史的指南针？宽恕的代价由谁来承担？受害者如何在不以遗忘为代价的情况下重获尊严？

RECORDS.bookname: No One at the Wheel: Driverless Cars and the Road of the Future
RECORDS.bookabout: Is autonomy a tech triumph or a city-making test? Will curbs, pricing, and transit shape safer streets, or will zombie cars and private upgrades jam us? Who owns risk, data, and jobs—and who decides what "safe" truly means?

RECORDS.bookname: 无人掌舵：无人驾驶汽车与未来之路
RECORDS.bookabout: 自动驾驶究竟是一次技术的胜利，还是一场城市塑造的考验？是由路边空间管理、定价和公共交通来打造更安全的街道，还是会让僵尸车和私人改装升级把我们堵得寸步难行？风险、数据和工作归谁所有——又由谁来决定“安全”的真正含义？

RECORDS.bookname: On Grief and Grieving: Finding the Meaning of Grief Through the Five Stages of Loss
RECORDS.bookabout: What if grief isn't a staircase but a living rhythm—felt in bodies, shaped by rituals, and carried through bonds that continue? What if meaning emerges not by moving on, but by moving with loss into new choices and shared purpose?

RECORDS.bookname: 悲伤与哀悼：在失去的五个阶段中寻找悲伤的意义
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果悲伤不是一段阶梯，而是一种有生命的律动——在身体里被感受，由仪式塑造，并由延续的联结承载，会怎样？如果意义不是靠走出来，而是与失去同行，迈向新的选择与共同的使命，因而得以涌现，又会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: One Blade of Grass: Finding the Old Road of the Heart, a Zen Memoir
RECORDS.bookabout: From childhood affliction to a beachside glimpse, from New Mexico koans to reviving a high‑desert sangha—could practice turn depression into belonging, and private insight into service?  Might the only way to keep Zen be to give it away?

RECORDS.bookname: 一根草叶：寻回心之古道，禅修回忆录
RECORDS.bookabout: 从童年的苦难，到海边的一瞥；从新墨西哥州的公案，到重振高原沙漠的僧团——修行能否把抑郁化作归属感，把私人的洞见转为奉献？守护禅的唯一方式，会不会正是把它给予他人？

RECORDS.bookname: How to Live: Or A Life of Montaigne in One Question and Twenty Attempts at an Answer
RECORDS.bookabout: What if doubt were not paralysis but a daily practice? Could friendship, loss, travel, and illness train attention, soften judgment, and teach freedom? Would a quiet room, a porous heart, and curious eyes be enough to learn how to live?

RECORDS.bookname: 如何生活：或者，围绕一个问题与二十次尝试作答，讲述蒙田的一生
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果怀疑不是瘫痪，而是一种每日的练习，会怎样？
友谊、失去、旅行和疾病，能否锻炼专注，松动评判，教会自由？
一间安静的房间、一颗通透的心和一双好奇的眼睛，是否足以学会怎样生活？

RECORDS.bookname: Heartland: A Memoir of Working Hard and Being Broke in the Richest Country on Earth
RECORDS.bookabout: What if poverty isn't a personal failure but a geography, a lineage, a policy choice? What does a red childhood teach about class? Can crossing divides heal and wound at once? Whose voice steadies survival across generations?

RECORDS.bookname: 腹地：在世界上最富有的国家里，拼命工作却依然身无分文的回忆录
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果贫困不是个人的失败，而是地域、家族渊源、政策抉择，会怎样？红色童年能教会我们怎样理解阶级？跨越鸿沟，能否在疗愈的同时也带来伤痛？又是谁的声音，稳住了一代又一代人的生计？

RECORDS.bookname: In the Shadow of Statues: A White Southerner Confronts History
RECORDS.bookabout: What if tearing down monuments isn't erasing history but reclaiming it? How do cranes, courtrooms, and city streets reveal who belongs? Can a mayor's reckoning with symbols spark civic courage, honest memory, and a more equal future?

RECORDS.bookname: 在雕像的阴影下：一位南方白人直面历史
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果拆除纪念碑不是抹去历史，而是把历史夺回呢？起重机、法庭和城市街道如何揭示谁才真正属于这里？一位市长直面符号，能否唤起公民的勇气，促成诚实的记忆，并推动更为平等的未来？

RECORDS.bookname: In Praise of Shadows
RECORDS.bookabout: What if beauty thrives not under bright glare but in hush and half-light? How do rain, paper, wood, and time compose rooms, bodies, and rituals? Can modern conveniences yield, just enough, to let shadows teach us how to see?

RECORDS.bookname: 阴翳礼赞
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果美不在刺目的强光下，而在寂静与半明半暗中滋长，会怎样？
雨、纸、木与时间，如何共同编织出房间、身体与仪式？
现代的便利能否恰到好处地退让，让阴影来教我们如何看见？

RECORDS.bookname: Inner Excellence: Train Your Mind for Extraordinary Performance and the Best Possible Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if peak performance isn't about talent or outcomes at all? What if you could rewire beliefs, train state on demand, and lead with love, wisdom, and courage—staying calm under pressure and turning every challenge into fuel?

RECORDS.bookname: 内在卓越：训练你的心智，以成就非凡表现与尽可能最好的人生
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果所谓的巅峰表现，根本与天赋或结果无关呢？如果你可以重塑信念，让自己随时进入理想状态，并以爱、智慧与勇气为引领——在压力之下仍保持冷静，把每一次挑战都化作前行的动力？

RECORDS.bookname: Joy on Demand: The Art of Discovering the Happiness Within
RECORDS.bookabout: What if joy were a trainable skill available in a single breath? Could micro-practices reshape attention, compassion, and habits at work and home—turning thin slices of delight into stable calm, resilient kindness, and everyday meaning?

RECORDS.bookname: 喜悦随手可得：发现内心幸福的艺术
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果喜悦是一种可以训练的能力，只需一口气就能触达，会怎样？这些微小的练习能否重塑我们的注意力、同情心，以及在工作和家庭中的习惯——把细碎的欢愉化为持久的平静、坚韧的善意与日常的意义？

RECORDS.bookname: Leaving Microsoft to Change the World: An Entrepreneur's Odyssey to Educate the World's Children
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a corporate high-flyer traded stock options for backpacks? Can unit economics, joyful storytelling, and local co-ownership rewrite children's futures across Asia? And when crises hit, could stubborn optimism still scale libraries, schools, and girls' scholarships?

RECORDS.bookname: 离开微软，改变世界：一位创业者的全球儿童教育之旅
RECORDS.bookabout:
如果一位企业高管把股票期权换成背包，会怎样？
单位经济、快乐的讲故事和本地共同所有机制，能否改写亚洲各地孩子的未来？
当危机来袭时，倔强的乐观还能否继续扩大图书馆、学校和女孩奖学金的规模？

RECORDS.bookname: Levels of the Game
RECORDS.bookabout: Is a single tennis match just points, or a live x-ray of identity? Watch styles, mentors, and social worlds collide in 1968 as pressure speaks, history echoes, and each serve asks—who are you when the ball returns?

RECORDS.bookname: 比赛的层次
RECORDS.bookabout: 一场网球比赛，究竟只是分数的累积，还是一场对身份的现场X光透视？回到1968年，看风格、师承与社会世界激烈碰撞；在压力发声、历史回响之际，每一次发球都在追问：当球回到你面前，你是谁？

RECORDS.bookname: Manifest: 7 Steps to Living Your Best Life
RECORDS.bookabout: Craving a practical route from self-doubt to self-direction? What if seven simple moves —clarify vision, remove fear, align behavior, pass tests, embrace gratitude, turn envy into inspiration, trust timing —could reshape daily choices and outcomes? Ready to try?

RECORDS.bookname: 显化：活出最佳人生的7个步骤
RECORDS.bookabout: 是否渴望一条实用路径，让你从自我怀疑走向自我主导？如果七个简单步骤——明确愿景,消除恐惧,校准行为,通过考验,拥抱感恩,将嫉妒转化为灵感,信任时机——就能重塑你的日常选择与结果，会怎样？准备好试试了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Make Change That Lasts: 9 Simple Ways to Break Free from the Habits That Hold You Back
RECORDS.bookabout: What if lasting change isn't about grit, but micro-commitments, clearer self-portraits, honest boundaries, learner reflexes, and redesigned environments? Could five minutes, slower breaths, kinder stories, and stronger communities turn effort into ease—and habits into identity?

RECORDS.bookname: 让改变持久：9个简单方法，摆脱拖你后腿的习惯
