RECORDS.bookabout: Want to turn chaos into clarity, boredom into challenge, and work into play? Curious how attention becomes psychic energy and meaning a life-wide skill? Ready to practice flow in body, mind, and relationships—anywhere, anytime, for lasting growth?

RECORDS.bookname: 心流：最优体验心理学
RECORDS.bookabout: 想把混乱变成清晰，把无聊变成挑战，把工作变成游戏吗？好奇注意力如何转化为心理能量，让意义成为贯穿一生的能力吗？准备好在身体、心智和人际关系中随时随地练习心流，实现持久成长了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Founding Brothers: The Revolutionary Generation
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a nation's beginnings hinged on whispered deals, a sanctioned silence over slavery, a single fatal duel, and a Farewell that modeled restraint? How did those choices buy time and teach Americans to argue without breaking?

RECORDS.bookname: 开国兄弟：革命的一代
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个国家的开端，建立在密室交易、对奴隶制的制度性缄默、一场致命的决斗，以及一篇树立克制典范的告别演说之上，会怎样？这些抉择又如何为它赢得时间，并教会美国人如何争而不裂？

RECORDS.bookname: Freedom Evolves
RECORDS.bookabout: Is freedom an illusion in a lawful universe, or a skill we cultivate through evolution, culture, and education? How do reasons, reputation, and institutions bootstrap moral agency—and what threatens it today? Ready to test your assumptions?

RECORDS.bookname: 自由在进化
RECORDS.bookabout: 在一个遵循规律的宇宙里，自由究竟是一场幻觉，还是一种我们通过进化,文化,教育不断培养出的能力？理由,声誉,制度如何让道德能动性自我起步并成长，而今天又是什么在威胁它？准备好检验你的假设了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Get Your Sh*t Together: How to Stop Worrying About What You Should Do So You Can Finish What You Need to Do and Start Doing What You Want to Do
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of willpower failing at 3 p.m.? What if a simple S‑F‑C loop, not motivation, ran your days? Want money, work, home, and headspace aligned? Ready to set boundaries, automate wins, and make small, stubborn progress every week?

RECORDS.bookname: 把你的破事理顺：不再纠结“该做什么”，先把“必须做的事”做完，再去做“想做的事”
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了下午三点意志力见底吗？要是让一个简单的S‑F‑C循环，而不是靠动力，来掌控你的每一天，会怎样？想让财务、工作、家庭和心境对齐吗？准备好设定界限、让成功自动发生，而且每周都取得小而顽强的进步了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Girl, Stop Apologizing: A Shame-Free Plan for Embracing and Achieving Your Goals
RECORDS.bookabout: What if ambition required no apology? What if excuses were swapped for habits? Could a single focused goal reshape ten years? Ready to train confidence, resilience, and results? Believe, set boundaries, ask for help, and move.

RECORDS.bookname: 女孩，别再道歉：摆脱羞耻感的计划，帮助你拥抱并实现你的目标
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果野心无需道歉，会怎样？如果用习惯取代借口呢？一个专注的目标，能重塑十年吗？你准备好去锤炼自信与韧性，创造成果了吗？相信,设定边界,寻求帮助,付诸行动。

RECORDS.bookname: How to Fix the Future
RECORDS.bookabout: Can we fix a fractured digital age without surrendering our agency? What if regulation, open tech, civic responsibility, empowered users, and reinvented education form a practical toolkit? Curious how Estonia, Singapore, Germany, and Oakland test it?

RECORDS.bookname: 如何修复未来
RECORDS.bookabout: 在不放弃自主权的情况下，我们能修复这个支离破碎的数字时代吗？如果监管、开放技术、公民责任、让用户更有主导权以及重塑教育能组成一套实用工具箱，会怎样？好奇爱沙尼亚、新加坡、德国和奥克兰会如何检验它？

RECORDS.bookname: Beyond Tidy: Declutter Your Mind and Discover the Magic of Organized Living
RECORDS.bookabout: What if being organized meant simply knowing what you have and finding it fast, not prettier bins ? What if clutter were deferred decisions, and finishing tasks, labels, and space rules made homes low‑friction and minds calmer ?

RECORDS.bookname: 整洁之外：清理你的思绪，发现井井有条生活的魔力
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果有序意味着仅仅知道你拥有什么并快速找到它，而不是有更漂亮的收纳箱呢？如果杂乱是推迟的决策，而完成任务、标签和空间规则使家居环境变得简洁流畅、心灵更加平静呢？

RECORDS.bookname: Birth of the Chaordic Age
RECORDS.bookabout: How can order emerge from apparent disorder? What if institutions thrived by shared purpose and simple principles instead of control? From a collapsing card industry to society-wide renewal, this journey asks: can persuasion, trust, and self-governance rewire our future?

RECORDS.bookname: 涣散组织时代的诞生
RECORDS.bookabout: 秩序如何能从明显的混乱中产生？如果机构通过共同的目标和简单的原则，而不是通过控制来兴旺发展，会怎样呢？从一个衰败的纸牌行业到整个社会的更新，这段旅程提出问题：说服、信任和自我治理能否重塑我们的未来？

RECORDS.bookname: Body Kindness: Transform Your Health from the Inside Out—and Never Say Diet Again
RECORDS.bookabout: What if health isn't a number but a relationship you practice? Ready to trade food rules for peace, tiny kind choices, and upward spirals, guided by Love–Connect–Care, values, sleep, joyful movement, and belonging that actually lasts?

RECORDS.bookname: 身体善待：从内而外改造你的健康——永远不再谈论节食
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果健康不仅仅是一个数字，而是一个你可以践行的关系呢？准备好将饮食规则换成宁静、细微的友善选择和积极向上的循环，由爱-连接-关怀、价值观、睡眠、快乐的运动和持久的归属感来指引吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Click: The Forces Behind How We Fully Engage with People, Work, and Everything We Do
RECORDS.bookabout: What if instant rapport isn't luck but a set of levers—vulnerability, resonance, proximity, similarity, and environment—you can pull? Could inches, small truths, and shared frames ignite trust, creativity, and performance faster than years of careful networking?

RECORDS.bookname: 瞬间吸引力：全面投入人际关系、工作及一切事务背后的力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果瞬间的融洽不是运气使然，而是一套可以操控的杠杆——如脆弱性、共鸣、接近、相似性和环境——那么会怎样？这些微小的距离、简单的真相和共同的框架，是否可能比多年的精细建立关系更快速地激发信任、创造力和表现力？

RECORDS.bookname: Brief Candle in the Dark: My Life in Science
RECORDS.bookabout: Isn't science a way to turn doubt into a tool, from wasp economics to genes that shape nests, from televised lectures to code-born creatures? What if evolution's logic guides public reason, personal memory, and even digital worlds we build?

RECORDS.bookname: 暗夜微光：我的科学人生
RECORDS.bookabout: 科学不就是一种将怀疑转化为工具的方法吗，从黄蜂经济学到塑造巢穴的基因，从电视讲座到由代码生成的生物？如果说进化的逻辑可以指导公众的理性思维、个人的记忆，甚至我们构建的数字世界会怎么样呢？

RECORDS.bookname: Brotopia: Breaking Up the Boys' Club of Silicon Valley
RECORDS.bookabout: Think tech rose purely on merit? What if tests, parties, and insider bonds quietly shaped who belongs, and who vanishes? Curious how whistleblowers, policy shifts, and algorithm audits might reshape power, pay, and products? Ready to question the default?

RECORDS.bookname: 硅谷兄弟会：打破男性俱乐部的神话
RECORDS.bookabout: 你认为科技行业完全是凭借能力而发展的吗？还是说测试、聚会和内部关系悄悄地决定了谁能够留下，谁将消失？想知道告密者、政策变动和算法审查如何可能重新塑造权力、薪酬和产品？准备好去质疑默认规则了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Climbing Mount Improbable
RECORDS.bookabout: Could complex eyes, wings, and webs arise without a planner? What if chance only supplies raw sketches while selection edits relentlessly? Why do shells and societies share hidden rules? Ready to climb gentle slopes toward improbable heights?

RECORDS.bookname: 攀登不可能之山
RECORDS.bookabout: 复杂的眼睛、翅膀和网络是否能在没有规划者的情况下出现？如果机遇仅仅提供粗略的草图，而选择则不断地进行编辑呢？为什么贝壳和社会都会遵循隐藏的规则？准备好沿着平缓的坡度攀登通向不可能的高度吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Crazy Faith: It’s Only Crazy Until It Happens
RECORDS.bookabout: What if small, mustard-seed steps rewired reality? What if waiting was training, storms were assignments, and words built runways? Tired of fake comfort? Ready to trade borrowed beliefs for lived testimony and off‑schedule breakthroughs that reshape families and neighborhoods?

RECORDS.bookname: 疯狂的信仰：直到发生前，它看起来疯狂
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果微小如芥子般的步伐能重新编织现实会怎样？如果等待是一种训练，风暴是任务，而语言是筑造跑道的工具呢？对虚假的安慰感到厌倦了吗？做好准备用亲身体验和影响家庭与邻里的突破来取代借来的信念了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Creative, Inc.: The Ultimate Guide to Running a Successful Freelance Business
RECORDS.bookauthor: Meg Mateo Ilasco / Joy Deangdeelert Cho
RECORDS.bookabout: Craving autonomy yet unsure how to price, pitch, and protect your work? Want a roadmap from positioning and branding to collaboration, contracts, and sustainable growth? Curious how licensing beats hourly rates and systems multiply output without burnout?

RECORDS.bookname: 创意公司：成功自由职业者的终极指南
RECORDS.bookauthor: Meg Mateo Ilasco / Joy Deangdeelert Cho
RECORDS.bookabout: 渴望自主却不确定如何定价、推销和保护您的工作？想要一个从定位和品牌到合作、合同和可持续增长的路线图吗？好奇授权如何胜过按小时收费，系统如何在不导致倦怠的情况下成倍提高产出吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Empire: How Britain Made the Modern World
RECORDS.bookabout: Was empire a pirate's gamble turned legal bureaucracy, a machine for liberty and bondage at once? How did tea, gunboats, bankers, and wars knit and unravel a global order whose institutions still guide us today?

RECORDS.bookname: 帝国：大不列颠如何塑造现代世界
RECORDS.bookabout: 帝国是海盗的赌注变成合法的官僚机构，是同时为自由和束缚服务的机器吗？茶叶、炮舰、银行家和战争是如何编织和解构一个全球秩序，其机构至今仍在指引我们？

RECORDS.bookname: Finding Flow: The Psychology of Engagement with Everyday Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if happiness hinges less on outcomes and more on how you direct attention? Could work, leisure, and relationships become laboratories for mastery? Shape goals, time, and feedback, cultivate an autotelic self, and align meaning with larger systems.

RECORDS.bookname: 心流：日常生活中的投入心理学
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果幸福不那么依赖于结果，而更多取决于你如何引导注意力会怎样？工作、娱乐和人际关系能否成为获得精通的实验室？设定目标、规划时间、获取反馈，培养自得其乐的自我，并将意义与更大的体系相结合。

RECORDS.bookname: Everybody: A Book about Freedom
RECORDS.bookabout: What if freedom lives in flesh—stored in tension, illness, sex, and crowds? What if healing and protest share a pulse? Could bodies resist prisons, markets, and shame by making art, unions, and care? Ready to test that wager?

RECORDS.bookname: 人人：一本关于自由的书
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果自由存在于肉体中——储存于紧张、疾病、性和人群中，会怎么样？如果治愈和抗议共同拥有一种脉动会怎么样？身体是否可以通过艺术、工会和关怀来抵抗监狱、市场和羞耻？准备好去验证这个赌注了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Finding Your Element: How to Discover Your Talents and Passions and Transform Your Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your work is hidden where talent and fascination intersect? Could small experiments, energy habits, and the right tribes unlock flow, resilience, and purpose? Ready to map your aptitudes, reshape roles, and build a path while walking it?

RECORDS.bookname: 发现你的元素：如何发现你的才能和激情并改变你的生活
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的工作就隐藏在才能与迷恋交汇的地方会怎样？小实验、能量习惯和合适的圈子能否激发流畅性、韧性和目标感？准备好描绘你的才能，重新塑造角色，并在前行的同时打造自己的道路了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Flash Crash: A Trading Savant, a Global Manhunt and the Most Mysterious Market Crash in History
RECORDS.bookabout: When machines race in microseconds, what happens to human judgment, fairness, and law? Could one trader's screen shape global markets, spark a crash, and rewrite rules? And what costs do secrecy, speed, and intent impose on everyone else?

RECORDS.bookname: 闪崩：交易天才、全球追捕与历史上最神秘的市场崩盘
RECORDS.bookabout: 当机器在微秒间进行竞争时，人类的判断、公平和法律会发生什么变化？一个交易员的屏幕是否能影响全球市场，触发崩盘，并重塑规则？而保密性、速度和意图对其他人带来的代价又是什么？

RECORDS.bookname: Global Content Marketing: How to Create Great Content, Reach More Customers, and Build a Worldwide Marketing Strategy that Works
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of scattershot content and siloed teams? What if one framework could align strategy, creation, distribution, and optimization across languages and markets? Want a practical playbook for scaling trust, leads, and learning—while staying local and measurable?

RECORDS.bookname: 全球内容营销：如何创作优秀内容，吸引更多客户，并建立有效的全球营销战略
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了零散的内容和孤立的团队吗？如果有一个框架可以让战略、创建、分发和优化在不同语言和市场间保持一致，会怎样呢？是否想要一本实用的指南，以帮助扩大信任、增加潜在客户和提升学习效果，同时保持本地化和可测量？

RECORDS.bookname: The Googlization of Everything: (And Why We Should Worry)
RECORDS.bookabout: Who decides what counts as knowledge—rankings or readers? When search, ads, and defaults steer culture, what happens to libraries, news, and privacy? Can public institutions reclaim autonomy with interoperability and law, or will convenience quietly govern our democracy?

RECORDS.bookname: 一切皆谷歌化：我们为何应该担忧
RECORDS.bookabout: 是排名还是读者来决定什么被视为知识？当搜索、广告和默认选项引导文化发展时，对图书馆、新闻和隐私会产生什么影响？公共机构能否通过互操作性和法律重新获得自主权，还是便利悄然主导我们的民主？

RECORDS.bookname: Growth IQ: Get Smarter About the Choices that Will Make or Break Your Business
RECORDS.bookabout: What if growth isn't a single bet but a choreography of context, combination, and sequence? Ready to rewire experience, expand markets, reshape portfolios, and borrow strength from partners—while leaping at the right moment? Curious how Day One never ends?

RECORDS.bookname: 增长智慧：了解那些将成就或破坏你业务的选择
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果增长不是一次单一的赌注，而是情境、组合和顺序的精心编排呢？准备重塑体验，拓展市场，改造投资组合，并且从合作伙伴那里借力，同时在合适的时机一跃而起？想知道如何让“第一天”永无止境吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Half the Sky: Turning Oppression into Opportunity for Women Worldwide
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the cheapest way to change the world starts with one girl's classroom, one midwife's kit, one village's vow? Why do markets, laws, and beliefs conspire—and how can data, allies, and everyday choices break the cycle?

RECORDS.bookname: 半边天：把压迫转化为全球女性的机会
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果改变世界的最经济方法从一个女孩的课堂、一个助产士的工具包、一个村庄的誓言开始，那会怎样？为什么市场、法律和信仰会共同阻碍——而数据、盟友和日常选择如何能打破这个循环？

RECORDS.bookname: Hitch-22: A Memoir
RECORDS.bookabout: From a mother's tragic exit  to Cuba's "new man" promises, from Prague's crushed hopes  to Kurdistan's graves, isn't this a life testing convictions in public? And can law, pluralism, and the liberty to leave outlast zealotry ?

RECORDS.bookname: 搭便车22：回忆录
RECORDS.bookabout: 从一位母亲悲惨的离世到古巴“新人”的承诺，从布拉格破灭的希望到库尔德斯坦的坟墓，这难道不是一个在公众中考验信念的生活吗？法律、多元化以及离开的自由能否比狂热更持久？

RECORDS.bookname: How Not To Be a Boy
RECORDS.bookabout: What if masculinity were just a script you could rewrite? What if grief taught fluency your childhood denied? From playgrounds to TV studios, from panic to partnership, could love, work, and daily chores become a braver language?

RECORDS.bookname: 如何不做一个男孩
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果阳刚之气仅仅是一个可以重写的剧本会怎么样？如果悲伤能教会你儿时未能获得的流利表达？从操场到电视演播室，从恐慌到合作，爱、工作和日常琐事能否成为一种更加勇敢的语言呢？

RECORDS.bookname: How to Fly a Horse: The Secret History of Creation, Invention, and Discovery
RECORDS.bookabout: What if genius is a myth, and creativity is ordinary work anyone can learn? What if persistence, prototypes, and evidence—not epiphanies—solve problems? Want stories where rejection becomes fuel, teams amplify ideas, and tomorrow is built step by step?

RECORDS.bookname: 如何飞马：创造、发明与发现的秘密历史
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果天才是一个神话，而创造力是任何人都可以学习的普通工作会怎样？如果解决问题的关键不是顿悟，而是坚持、原型和证据会怎样？想听那些拒绝成为动力、团队放大创意、明天逐步构建的故事吗？

RECORDS.bookname: How Trust Works: The Science of How Relationships Are Built, Broken, and Repaired
RECORDS.bookabout: Why do we trust some after a single misstep yet shun others forever? What if motives outweigh outcomes, safeguards alter meaning, and repair requires costly signals? Can law satisfy hearts? In polarized cultures, how do institutions and individuals rebuild confidence?

RECORDS.bookname: 信任如何运作：关系建立、破裂与修复的科学
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么有些人犯过一次错误后我们仍然信任他们，而另一些人则被我们永远拒绝？如果动机的权重超过结果，防范措施改变了意义，修复需要付出代价的信号，那我们该怎么办？法律能够满足人心吗？在极化的文化中，机构和个人如何重建信任？

RECORDS.bookname: Imagine If . . .: Creating a Future for Us All
RECORDS.bookabout: What if imagination were our greatest public resource, education a living ecosystem, and schools habitats rather than factories, as argued here ? Could eight human capacities steer humane responses to demographic, technological, and ecological upheavals—and start now ?

RECORDS.bookname: 畅想未来：为我们所有人创造一个美好的明天
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果想象力是我们最大的公共资源，教育是一个活生生的生态系统，而学校是栖息地而非工厂呢？在此提出的观点中，这样的设想能否成立？八种人类能力是否能够引导人性化的回应，以应对人口、技术和生态的剧变——并且从现在开始？

RECORDS.bookname: Influence and Impact: Discover and Excel at What Your Organization Needs From You The Most
RECORDS.bookabout: Want to align your work with what truly matters? Tired of busyness masquerading as progress? Ready to craft a plan, pivot when fit fails, and amplify others' results—turning influence into visible impact across the enterprise? Here's the practical, research-backed playbook.

RECORDS.bookname: 影响与效果：发现并超越组织对你的最大需求
RECORDS.bookabout: 想让你的工作与真正重要的事物保持一致吗？厌倦了繁忙却没有实质进展的状态吗？准备制定一个计划，当适应不够时进行调整，并放大其他人的成果——将影响力转化为整个企业内可见的成果？这里有一个实用且有研究支持的行动指南。

RECORDS.bookname: Intuition Pumps and Other Tools for Thinking
RECORDS.bookabout: What if thought experiments are tools, not parlor tricks? What if minds are virtual machines, meanings arise from use, and freedom is disciplined self-control? Want cranes over skyhooks, stories over theaters, and practice that actually improves thinking?

RECORDS.bookname: 直觉泵和其他思考工具
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果说思想实验是工具，而不是娱乐戏法呢？如果心灵是虚拟机器，意义从使用中产生，自由则是自律的自我控制呢？渴望机械设备而不是虚无缥缈的幻想，渴望故事而非舞台布景，以及能够真正提高思维的实践吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Irresistible: The Rise of Addictive Technology and the Business of Keeping Us Hooked
RECORDS.bookabout: What if our screens aren't neutral windows but carefully tuned slot machines? Why do goals, streaks, and social praise feel irresistible, even as sleep and focus fray? Want practical ways to reclaim attention without quitting technology?

RECORDS.bookname: 难以抗拒：成瘾性科技的兴起及其吸引我们的商业策略
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果我们的屏幕不是中立的窗口，而是精心调整的老虎机？为什么目标、连续记录和社交赞美会让人无法抗拒，即使睡眠和注意力逐渐减弱？想要在不放弃科技的情况下，找回注意力的实用方法吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Islam and the Future of Tolerance: A Dialogue
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the fault line isn't Islam but imposing one reading—and by force?  What if recruiters turn grievance into mission, while taboos mute honesty, and reform starts by naming the ideology and rebuilding civic identity?

RECORDS.bookname: 伊斯兰与宽容的未来：对话
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果问题的根源不是伊斯兰教，而是强加一种解读——并且是靠武力强加呢？如果招募者将怨愤转变为使命，而禁忌压制了诚实，而改革则始于明确意识形态并重建公民身份呢？

RECORDS.bookname: I'd Rather Be Reading: The Delights and Dilemmas of the Reading Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if reading isn't a hobby but a way of life? What if your shelves are a diary, your friends matchmakers, and quitting a virtue? Ready to build rituals, spaces, and freedom around pages that shape your days?

RECORDS.bookname: 我宁愿读书：阅读生活的乐趣与困扰
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果阅读不只是一个爱好，而是一种生活方式呢？如果你的书架是一部日记，你的朋友是红娘，而放弃是一种美德呢？准备围绕塑造你日子的书页建立习惯、空间和自由了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: I've Been Thinking . . .: Reflections, Prayers, and Meditations for a Meaningful Life
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a meaningful life isn't found but practiced daily? Through brief reflections, prayers, and stories, it invites you to choose identity, pause, listen, forgive, nurture community, and trust a larger power—then remake your path with hope.

RECORDS.bookname: 我一直在思考……：关于有意义生活的反思、祈祷和冥想
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个有意义的生活不是找到的，而是每日实践的呢？通过简短的反思、祈祷和故事，它邀请你选择身份、暂停、倾听、宽恕、培育社区，并信任更大的力量——然后用希望重塑你的道路。

RECORDS.bookname: Jane: A Murder
RECORDS.bookabout: Who builds a life from fragments? What happens when archives, ride boards, and gravestones talk back? How do family rituals, sisterly envy, and public terror braid into one fate? Would you trust memory, evidence—or the imagination stitching them?

RECORDS.bookname: 简：一桩谋杀案
RECORDS.bookabout: 谁能从碎片中构建生活？当档案、告示板和墓碑开始回应时，会发生什么？家庭仪式、姐妹间的嫉妒和公共恐惧是如何编织成一个命运的？你会信任记忆、证据，还是那些将它们缝合在一起的想象力？

RECORDS.bookname: Killing the Legends: The Lethal Danger of Celebrity
RECORDS.bookabout: What if fame isn't a reward but a trap? What happens when managers, entourages, and public adoration hijack autonomy? Through a singer, a songwriter, and a boxer, you'll watch brilliance collide with control, addiction, and fate.

RECORDS.bookname: 杀死传奇：名人致命的危险
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果名声不是一种奖励，而是一种陷阱呢？当经理人、随行人员以及公众的崇拜剥夺了自主权，会发生什么？通过一个歌手、一个词曲创作人和一个拳击手的故事，你将看到才华与控制、成瘾和命运相互碰撞。

RECORDS.bookname: Kinds of Minds: The Origins Of Consciousness
RECORDS.bookabout: What if minds come in layers, from simple feedback to culture-shaped reflection? Could language, bodies, and tools manufacture consciousness rather than reveal it? And if suffering—not IQ—grounds moral worth, how should we treat animals, machines, even ourselves?

RECORDS.bookname: 思维的类型：意识的起源
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果意识是由多个层次构成，从简单的反馈到由文化塑造的反思，那么会怎样？语言、身体和工具是否可以制造意识，而不是揭示意识？如果道德价值的基础是痛苦而不是智商，我们应该如何对待动物、机器，甚至对待我们自己？

RECORDS.bookname: Killing the Rising Sun: How America Vanquished World War II Japan
RECORDS.bookabout: How did an empire sprint from expansion to annihilation? What split-second choices shaped Pearl Harbor, Guadalcanal, and the firebombed cities? Who guarded a surrender recording, and why did a "new shogun" rewrite a nation's laws under foreign occupation?

RECORDS.bookname: 杀灭旭日：美国如何打败二战日本
RECORDS.bookabout: 一个帝国如何从扩张迅速走向毁灭？哪些瞬间决策影响了珍珠港、瓜达尔卡纳尔岛和被火焚烧的城市？是谁守护了投降录音，为什么“新幕府”在外国占领下重新制定了国家法律？

RECORDS.bookname: Knowledge: A Very Short Introduction
RECORDS.bookabout: What do you truly know, and how would you tell? When search is instant yet doubt lingers, can perception, memory, and testimony still ground certainty? What defeats luck, answers skepticism, and reveals why knowledge—not mere true belief—matters for action?

RECORDS.bookname: 知识：简明介绍
RECORDS.bookabout: 你真正了解什么，又该如何表达？当搜索变得即时而怀疑依然存在时，感知、记忆和证词还能否成为确定性的基础？是什么战胜了运气，解答了怀疑，并揭示了知识——而不仅仅是真实信念——对行动的重要性？

RECORDS.bookname: Learn Like a Pro: Science-Based Tools to Become Better at Anything
RECORDS.bookabout: Want to learn faster by toggling focus and diffuse modes? Curious how chunking, recall, spacing, and interleaving reshape memory? What if procrastination, test anxiety, and weak habits became levers for lifelong projects, collaboration, and compounding skills?

RECORDS.bookname: 专业学习：基于科学的工具让你在任何领域变得更优秀
RECORDS.bookabout: 想要通过切换专注模式和发散模式来更快地学习吗？对如何通过分块、回忆、间隔和交错来重塑记忆感到好奇吗？如果拖延、考试焦虑和薄弱的习惯能够成为终身项目、协作和技能复合的杠杆呢？

RECORDS.bookname: Letter to a Christian Nation
RECORDS.bookabout: What if faith deserved no special immunity? What if morality rests on reason, empathy, and suffering rather than revelation? Why let dogma steer policy on science and health? Could a secular compass better secure freedom, compassion, and our shared future?

RECORDS.bookname: 给基督教国家的信
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果信仰不享有特殊豁免会怎样？如果道德建立在理性、同情和苦难之上，而不是启示会怎样？为什么让教条来引导科学和健康政策？是否世俗的指引会更好地保障自由、同情和我们共同的未来？

RECORDS.bookname: Letters to a Young Contrarian
RECORDS.bookabout: What if dissent were a duty, conflict a teacher, and solitude your training ground? Could humor cut fear, and skepticism steady courage? From Bosnia to everyday silences, might principled argument and human dignity guide your next brave decision?

RECORDS.bookname: 给年轻反抗者的信
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果反对是一种责任，冲突是老师，而孤独是你的训练场地，会怎样？幽默能否斩断恐惧，怀疑能否稳住勇气？从波斯尼亚到日常的沉默，原则坚定的辩论和人的尊严能否引导你做出下一次勇敢的决策？

RECORDS.bookname: Life on the Screen: Identity in the Age of the Internet
RECORDS.bookabout: Where do bodies end and screens begin? What if aliases aren't escapes but mirrors reshaping identity, intimacy, and ethics? When interfaces seduce and artificial life feels real, can multiplicity cohere without denial—teaching us to live on a shifting threshold?

RECORDS.bookname: 屏幕上的生活：互联网时代的身份
RECORDS.bookabout: 身体的边界在哪里，屏幕又从何处开始？如果化名不是逃避，而是重塑身份、亲密关系和伦理的镜子会怎样？当界面令人着迷，人工生命感到真实时，能否在不否认的情况下让多重状态融合——教会我们在不断变化的边界上生活？

RECORDS.bookname: Logically Fallacious: The Ultimate Collection of Over 300 Logical Fallacies
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the flaw isn't in the conclusion you dislike, but in the path that leads there? Could formal missteps, sneaky rhetoric, and cognitive bias be steering debates, policies, and daily choices without you noticing?

RECORDS.bookname: 逻辑谬误：超过300种逻辑谬误的终极收藏
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果问题不在于你不喜欢的结论，而是在于通向结论的路径呢？会不会有可能是因为一些正式上的错误、不正当的修辞以及认知偏差在不知不觉中引导着辩论、政策和日常选择呢？

RECORDS.bookname: Lurking: How a Person Became a User
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wondered how we became "users"—confiding in search boxes and shifting from anonymous handles to enforced "real selves" —as casual sharing turns into engagement‑fueled pile‑ons, and the escape route looks more like a library than a marketplace ?

RECORDS.bookname: 潜伏：一个人成为用户的过程
RECORDS.bookabout: 是否曾想过我们是如何变成“用户”的——在搜索框中吐露心声，从匿名账号转向强制性的“真实自我”——随着随意分享变成参与驱动的狂热，而逃避途径看起来更像图书馆而不是市场？

RECORDS.bookname: Maps of Meaning: The Architecture of Belief
RECORDS.bookabout: What if myths aren't fairy tales but operating manuals for turning chaos into order? How do groups teach maps, face anomalies, and choose between hero and adversary? Could meaning and interest be instincts guiding courageous renewal in life and culture?

RECORDS.bookname: 意义地图：信念的结构
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果神话并不是童话故事，而是将混乱转变为秩序的操作手册，那会怎么样？群体如何传授地图知识、面对异常情况，并在英雄与对手之间做出选择？意义和兴趣是否可能是指引生活和文化勇敢重生的本能？

RECORDS.bookname: Marketing 5.0: Technology for Humanity
RECORDS.bookauthor: Philip Kotler / Hermawan Kartajaya / Iwan Setiawan
RECORDS.bookabout: What if marketing wasn't about pushing products but aligning human empathy with machine speed? Curious how AI, data, and agile teams reshape journeys, bridge divides, and personalize at scale—without losing ethics? Ready to see customer experience rebuilt end‑to‑end?

RECORDS.bookname: 营销5.0：科技助力人类
RECORDS.bookauthor: Philip Kotler / Hermawan Kartajaya / Iwan Setiawan
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果营销不是在推动产品，而是将人的同理心与机器速度相结合，会怎么样呢？是否好奇人工智能、数据及敏捷团队如何重塑旅程、弥合鸿沟，并在规模化个性化过程中保持伦理准则？准备好看到从头到尾重建的客户体验了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Mastering Logical Fallacies: The Definitive Guide to Flawless Rhetoric and Bulletproof Logic
RECORDS.bookabout: Think you can spot every faulty argument you hear today? What if the real danger hides in informal missteps, not tidy forms, and in quietly shifted burdens of proof you never noticed ? Discover patterns, counters, and habits that sharpen judgment.

RECORDS.bookname: 掌握逻辑谬误：完美修辞与无懈可击逻辑的权威指南
RECORDS.bookabout: 你认为今天能识别出每一个有问题的论点吗？如果真正的危险隐藏在非正式的失误中，而不是整齐的形式中，并且在你从未注意到的悄然转移的举证责任中呢？探索能够提高判断力的模式、反驳技巧和习惯。

RECORDS.bookname: MegaThreats: Ten Dangerous Trends That Imperil Our Future, And How to Survive Them
RECORDS.bookabout: What if rising debts, stubborn inflation, and fractured geopolitics are converging into one volatile era? Could weaponized finance, fragile supply chains, AI-driven inequality, pandemics, and climate costs trap policymakers and us in a dilemma with no painless exit?

RECORDS.bookname: 超级威胁：危及我们未来的十种危险趋势及其生存之道
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果不断上升的债务、顽固的通胀以及破裂的地缘政治汇聚成一个动荡的时代，会怎样？金融武器化、脆弱的供应链、人工智能驱动的不平等、疫情以及气候成本可能会将决策者和我们困在一个无痛解决的两难境地吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Models: Attract Women Through Honesty
RECORDS.bookabout: What if attraction isn't a trick but a filter you build with honesty, boundaries, and courage? Ready to let polarization screen for fit, use vulnerability without neediness, and turn clear actions into connection, touch, and lasting momentum?

RECORDS.bookname: 模范：通过诚实吸引女性
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果说吸引力并不是一种伎俩，而是通过诚实、设定界限和勇气所构建的过滤器呢？准备好让极化来筛选匹配，利用脆弱而不产生依赖，将明确的行动转化为情感连接、触碰和持久的动力了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: No Filter: The Inside Story of Instagram
RECORDS.bookabout: How did a minimalist photo app rewrite beauty, commerce, and celebrity—while battling its own parent company for identity? What happens when filters lower shame, metrics shape behavior, rivals force reinvention, and founders walk away? Ready to see the hidden playbook?

RECORDS.bookname: 无滤镜：Instagram内幕揭秘
RECORDS.bookabout: 一款极简主义的照片应用是如何重塑美感、商业和名人形象，同时在与其母公司争夺认同时进行斗争的？当滤镜减少羞愧感、指标塑造行为、竞争对手迫使其进行革新，而创始人选择离开时，会发生什么？准备好揭开这份隐藏的玩法秘籍了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Nonsense: The Power of Not Knowing
RECORDS.bookabout: What if uncertainty isn't a flaw but a feature? What if pausing, questioning, and testing beat quick certainty in medicine, policing, business, and art? Could ambiguity, bilingual minds, and structured doubt actually sharpen judgment, trust, and creativity?

RECORDS.bookname: 无知的力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果不确定性不是一种缺陷而是一种特质呢？如果在医学、执法、商业和艺术领域，暂停、质疑和测试胜过快速的确定性呢？模糊性、双语思维和有结构的怀疑是否真的能提升判断力、信任和创造力？

RECORDS.bookname: Nonzero: The Logic of Human Destiny
RECORDS.bookabout: Is history mere drift, or a pattern where life and culture widen cooperation, stack non‑zero‑sum gains, and bend toward one world? Curious how hunter bands become global governance —and how to model it? Come see the arrow take shape.

RECORDS.bookname: 非零：人类命运的逻辑
RECORDS.bookabout: 历史究竟是单纯的漂流，还是生命和文化在拓宽合作、积累非零和收益，并趋向于一个世界的模式？是否好奇狩猎部落如何演变为全球治理，以及如何进行建模？请来看看这一趋势如何形成。

RECORDS.bookname: Oath and Honor: A Memoir and a Warning
RECORDS.bookabout: How does an oath outlast a mob, a party line, and a media echo? What happens when a vice president refuses an unlawful command? Can evidence—texts, memos, testimony—reconstruct intent and demand accountability? Ready to test your civic instincts?

RECORDS.bookname: 誓言与荣誉：回忆录与警示
RECORDS.bookabout: 誓言如何能超越暴民、党派立场和媒体回声？当副总统拒绝一个非法命令时会发生什么？证据——文本、备忘录、证词——能否重构意图并要求问责？准备好测试你的公民意识了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Obedience to Authority: An Experimental View
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when ordinary people stop seeing themselves as moral actors and start as instruments of authority? Why do proximity, prestige, and peer dissent steer choices so sharply? Are we prepared to notice—and resist—our own compliance?

RECORDS.bookname: 服从权威：一种实验视角
RECORDS.bookabout: 当普通人不再视自己为道德行为者，而开始作为权威的工具时，会发生什么？为什么接近、声望和同辈的不同意见会如此明显地影响选择？我们是否准备好去注意并抵制自己的顺从？

RECORDS.bookname: Odd One Out
RECORDS.bookabout: Can a child state the rule before spotting the misfit? What if pictures train vocabulary, logic, and measurement in one seamless routine? Ready to test wheels, patterns, and lengths—then justify choices aloud and repair sets with smarter swaps?

RECORDS.bookname: 异类
RECORDS.bookabout: 孩子是否能在识别不合适项之前就陈述规则？如果图片能够在一个无缝的过程中训练词汇、逻辑和测量技能，会怎么样呢？准备好测试轮子、图案和长度，然后大声解释选择，并通过更聪明的替换来修复组合吗？

RECORDS.bookname: On War, Vol. 1
RECORDS.bookabout: Is war mere chaos, or a calculated instrument of policy shaped by human character, friction, and chance? How do leaders read murky reports, strike the decisive point, and pursue beyond victory's peak to secure political results?

RECORDS.bookname: 战争论第一卷
RECORDS.bookabout: 战争究竟是单纯的混乱，还是一种由人类性格、摩擦以及偶然性塑造的政策工具？领导者如何解读模糊不清的报告，找准决策的关键点，并在胜利的顶峰之后继续追求，以确保政治成果的实现呢？

RECORDS.bookname: One from Many: VISA and the Rise of Chaordic Organization
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a global network could thrive without command-and-control—guided by shared purpose, self-organization, and ethical information flows? How do cooperation and competition coexist? Can leadership mean releasing control? Curious how failures forged a new organizational DNA?

RECORDS.bookname: 众志成城：Visa与混沌组织的崛起
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个全球网络能够在没有指挥与控制的情况下蓬勃发展——通过共同的目标、自我组织和伦理信息流引导，这将会如何？合作与竞争如何共存？领导力是否可以意味着放弃控制？好奇失败是如何锻造出新的组织DNA的吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Out of Our Minds: The Power of Being Creative
RECORDS.bookabout: What if intelligence isn't a single score, creativity a teachable discipline, and organizations living cultures rather than machines? Could schools and universities truly nurture imagination, collaboration, and judgment? And might your next idea be valuable—and doable—today?

RECORDS.bookname: 远离平庸：创造力的力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果智慧不是一个单一的分数，创造力是一门可以教授的学科，而组织是活生生的文化而非机械，那么会怎样呢？学校和大学真的能够培育想象力、合作能力和判断力吗？或许你的下一个想法今天就可以变得有价值并且可行？

RECORDS.bookname: Outgrowing God: A Beginner’s Guide
RECORDS.bookabout: What if morality needs no divine policeman? What if myths grow like rumors and complexity blossoms step by step? Would evidence trump authority, kindness have biological roots, and science demand courage? Ready to rethink gods, scriptures, and ourselves?

RECORDS.bookname: 超越上帝：入门指南
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果道德不需要神的警察会怎样？如果神话像传言一样滋长，复杂性一步步绽放开来会怎样？证据会否胜过权威，善良有生物学的根源，科学需要勇气？准备好重新思考神灵、经典和我们自己了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Personality: What Makes You the Way You Are
RECORDS.bookabout: What if your quirks aren't flaws but strategic trade-offs? Why do five broad tendencies steer love, work, and health across shifting environments? How can habits and narratives reshape outcomes without rewriting temperament? Ready to test your own calibration?

RECORDS.bookname: 人格：是什么造就了你
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果你的独特之处不是缺陷，而是战略上的权衡选择呢？为什么有五种广泛的倾向会影响在变化的环境中爱情、工作和健康？习惯和叙述如何能在不改变性格的情况下改变结果？准备好测试你的个人校准了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Philosophy for Life and Other Dangerous Situations: Ancient Philosophy for Modern Problems
RECORDS.bookabout: What if ancient schools were practical boot camps for the mind? Could Stoics train resilience, Epicureans refine quiet joy, Skeptics cool dogma, Cynics spark street ethics, and Plato with Aristotle sketch civic virtue? Ready to test philosophy as daily training?

RECORDS.bookname: 生活哲学与其他危险境遇：古代哲学应对现代问题
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果古代的学堂是心灵实用的训练营会怎样？斯多葛学派能否锻炼出韧性，伊壁鸠鲁学派能否提升宁静的快乐，怀疑论者能否平息教条，犬儒学派能否点燃街头的伦理，而柏拉图与亚里士多德则能否勾勒出公民美德？准备好将哲学作为日常训练来检验了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Playing to Win: How Strategy Really Works
RECORDS.bookabout: What if strategy were a few brave choices, not a bloated plan? Would you define winning by customers' outcomes, pick a narrow field, build a hard‑to‑copy activity system, and pressure‑test assumptions until the choice makes itself?

RECORDS.bookname: 赢在战略：战略的真正运作方式
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果战略是一些勇敢的选择，而不是一个臃肿的计划，那会怎样？你会通过客户的成果来定义胜利，选择一个狭窄的领域，建立一个难以复制的活动系统，并反复检验假设，直到选择自然而然地形成吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Prepared for the Worst: Selected Essays and Minority Reports
RECORDS.bookabout: Isn't this a field guide to resisting consensus—testing power with argument, confronting sacred politics, unmasking "terrorism" talk, tracking Cold War theater, and demanding collective action on shared risks? And doesn't memory, not myth, anchor any honest public life?

RECORDS.bookname: 为最坏的情况做好准备：精选随笔与少数报告
RECORDS.bookabout: 这不正是一本抵制共识的实用指南吗——通过辩论来检验权力，面对神圣的政治，揭露“恐怖主义”的言辞，追踪冷战的舞台，并要求采取集体行动应对共同风险？而且，难道不是记忆而非神话构筑了任何真实的公共生活的基础吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Prequel: An American Fight Against Fascism
RECORDS.bookabout: How did foreign strategists aim to paralyze America's will—through camps, microphones, and Congress's own mail? Who sabotaged from within, who infiltrated back, and how did a chaotic sedition trial echo the 1930s playbook? Ready to test our democratic reflexes?

RECORDS.bookname: 序幕：美国对抗法西斯主义的斗争
RECORDS.bookabout: 外国战略家是如何通过集中营、麦克风以及国会的邮件来削弱美国意志的？是谁在内部进行破坏，又是谁进行了渗透，导致一场混乱的煽动叛乱审判像是复刻了1930年代的剧本？准备好考验我们的民主应对能力了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Reading the Comments: Likers, Haters, and Manipulators at the Bottom of the Web
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wonder why the bottom half of the web feels lawless yet irresistible? Who profits from stars, likes, and fakes? Can feedback heal what trolling and metrics warp, or does context keep slipping until we mutter, WTF?!

RECORDS.bookname: 阅读评论：网络底层的点赞者、批评者和操控者
RECORDS.bookabout: 有没有想过为什么网络的下半部分让人觉得无拘无束却难以抵挡诱惑？谁从明星、点赞和虚假信息中获利？反馈能否修复被喷子和数据扭曲的内容，还是背景不断消失直到我们感叹，“这是什么情况?!”

RECORDS.bookname: Reclaiming Conversation: The Power of Talk in a Digital Age
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a silent phone weakens empathy? What if solitude trains attention and care? Are we outsourcing intimacy to apps and robots? Could device‑free rituals rebuild families, teams, and public trust? Ready to choose presence over performance—and conversation over control?

RECORDS.bookname: 重拾对话：数字时代谈话的力量
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一个静音的手机削弱了同理心怎么办？如果独处能够训练注意力和关爱呢？我们是否将亲密关系外包给应用程序和机器人？无设备的仪式能否重建家庭、团队和公众信任？准备好选择真实存在而不是刻意表现，同时选择对话而不是控制吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Science in the Soul: Selected Writings of a Passionate Rationalist
RECORDS.bookabout: What if reason could kindle awe rather than snuff it out? What if evolution explains cooperation, ethics survives without heaven, and public life runs on evidence? Would you follow skeptical habits from classroom to ballot box, lab bench to choices?

RECORDS.bookname: 心灵中的科学：一位热情理性主义者的精选著作
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果理性能够激发敬畏而不是将其熄灭，那会怎么样？如果进化能够解释合作，伦理能够在没有天堂的情况下存在，公共生活以证据为基础，会怎么样？你会愿意把怀疑的思维习惯从课堂带到投票箱，从实验室带到日常选择吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Search Inside Yourself: The Unexpected Path to Achieving Success, Happiness (and World Peace)
RECORDS.bookabout: What if calm attention could turn reactivity into choice, and choice into leadership? Could vision align work with meaning, optimism fuel resilience, and compassion sharpen communication? Want a step-by-step practice that scales from your breath to your team—and beyond?

RECORDS.bookname: 向内探索：通往成功、幸福（与世界和平）的意想不到之路
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果沉着的注意力能够将反应性转变为选择，将选择转变为领导力，那会怎样？愿景能否使工作与意义相符，乐观能否助力韧性，慈悲能否提升沟通技巧？是否想要一种从你的呼吸到你的团队，甚至更广泛的循序渐进的练习方法？

RECORDS.bookname: Smaller Faster Lighter Denser Cheaper: How Innovation Keeps Proving the Catastrophists Wrong
RECORDS.bookabout: What if progress thrives by getting smaller, faster, lighter, denser, cheaper? Could energy density, efficiency, and open institutions outpace collapse narratives? Why cling to nostalgia over data, or low-density fixes over cleaner, reliable power, accountable markets, and patient science?

RECORDS.bookname: 更小、更快、更轻、更密、更便宜：创新如何不断证明灾难论者是错误的
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果进步通过变得更小、更快、更轻、更密集、更便宜而繁荣，会是什么样子？能量密度、效率和开放的机构是否能够超越崩溃的叙述？为什么要执着于怀旧而非数据，或选择低密度的解决方案而非更清洁、更可靠的能源、负责任的市场和耐心的科学？

RECORDS.bookname: So You've Been Publicly Shamed
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a single tweet becomes a tribunal? Why do platforms reward outrage while crowds feel righteous? Through vivid cases, psychology, and design fixes, this narrative asks: can we replace annihilation with repair—and still hold people accountable?

RECORDS.bookname: 于是你被公开羞辱了
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一条推文变成了审判会发生什么？为什么平台会奖励愤怒，而群众却感到正义？通过生动的案例、心理学和设计修正，这个叙述提出问题：我们能否用修复来替代毁灭——同时还让人们负起责任？

RECORDS.bookname: Social Media and Society: An Introduction to the Mass Media Landscape
RECORDS.bookabout: Curious how niche media, platform frameworks, and participatory culture rearrange power?  Where law, ethics, AI, and analytics intersect with well-being and civic life?  Seeking actionable skills for strategy, crisis, and careers beyond casual use?

RECORDS.bookname: 社交媒体与社会：大众媒体景观导论
RECORDS.bookabout: 好奇利基媒体、平台框架和参与文化如何重塑权力结构吗？了解法律、伦理、AI和分析如何与福祉和市民生活交汇吗？想要获取超越日常应用的策略、危机处理和职业发展的实用技能吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Stitches: A Handbook on Meaning, Hope and Repair
RECORDS.bookabout: When life tears, do we hunt for grand answers or sew small seams—walk, breathe, call a friend? What if sobriety, attention to birds, and shared casseroles are the pattern? Could seeking itself be the meaning?

RECORDS.bookname: 针线活：意义、希望与修复手册
RECORDS.bookabout: 当生活撕裂，我们是寻找宏大的答案还是缝合细小的裂缝——散步、呼吸、给朋友打电话？如果节制、关注鸟儿、共享砂锅菜肴就是生活的模式呢？或许探索本身就是意义所在？

RECORDS.bookname: Successful Time Management: How to be Organized, Productive and Get Things Done
RECORDS.bookabout: What if time were your scarcest capital—and you learned to invest it? Want a nine‑step workflow, disciplined email and paper systems, priority habits that stick, and collaboration rules that shield attention? Ready to trade busyness for measurable, career‑shaping results?

RECORDS.bookname: 成功的时间管理：如何组织、提高效率及完成任务
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果时间是你最稀缺的资本，而你学会了投资它呢？想要一个九步工作流程、有条理的电子邮件和纸质系统、能够坚持的优先习惯，以及保护注意力的协作规则吗？准备好以可衡量的、塑造职业生涯的结果来取代忙碌吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Super Attractor: Methods for Manifesting a Life beyond Your Wildest Dreams
RECORDS.bookabout: What if feeling good were a practical skill, not a guilty pleasure? What if guidance arrived through quiet signals, and small aligned steps outperformed hustle? Ready to let joy, surrender, and everyday signs turn effort into ease—and desire into experience?

RECORDS.bookname: 超级吸引者：实现超越想象生活的方法
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果感觉良好是一项实用技能，而不是一种内疚的放纵呢？如果指引是通过安静的信号到来，而小的协调步骤胜过忙碌呢？准备好让快乐、顺服和日常迹象将努力化为轻松，并将欲望转化为体验了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Sway: The Irresistible Pull of Irrational Behavior
RECORDS.bookabout: Why do smart people chase bad decisions, misjudge value, and silence dissent? Could money nudge kindness off course, and a single voice rescue a crowd? Want a toolkit to catch these traps in real time and choose differently?

RECORDS.bookname: 摇摆：非理性行为的不可抗拒的拉力
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么聪明的人会追求错误的决定，误判价值，并压制异议？金钱是否可能使善良偏离轨道，而一个声音能否拯救一群人？想要一个工具包来实时捕捉这些陷阱并做出不同的选择吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Ten Arguments for Deleting Your Social Media Accounts Right Now
RECORDS.bookabout: Who's steering your choices? Why do facts splinter while outrage thrives? When did metrics become meaning? If moods, markets, and elections are programmable, what remains of dignity? Ready to unplug, rebuild context, and reclaim your mind?

RECORDS.bookname: 立刻删除你的社交媒体账户的十个理由
RECORDS.bookabout: 是谁在引导你的选择？为什么事实会分裂而愤怒却在滋长？什么时候指标变成了意义？如果情绪、市场和选举都是可以编程的，那尊严还剩什么？准备好断开连接，重建背景，夺回你的思维了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: Thanks for the Feedback: The Science and Art of Receiving Feedback Well (even when it is off base, unfair, poorly delivered, and, frankly, you’re not in the mood)
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever bristle at criticism, confuse praise with evaluation, or miss the one fix that matters? What if you could name your triggers, clarify vague labels, set boundaries, and turn tense moments into experiments that reshape teams? Ready to learn differently?

RECORDS.bookname: 感谢反馈：高效接收反馈的科学与艺术
RECORDS.bookabout: 是否曾对批评感到愤怒，把赞美与评价混淆，或错过了关键的解决方案？如果你可以识别自己的触发点，厘清模糊的标签，设定界限，并将紧张时刻变成重塑团队的实验，你会怎样？准备以不同方式学习了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The 5 Elements of Effective Thinking
RECORDS.bookabout: What if clarity began with basics, not bravado? What if errors were instruments, questions the fuel, history the map, and change the destination? Ready to turn everyday thinking into a disciplined practice for sharper insights and dependable breakthroughs?

RECORDS.bookname: 有效思考的五要素
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果清晰始于基础，而非勇敢炫耀，会发生什么？如果错误是工具，问题是燃料，历史是地图，而改变是目的地呢？准备好将日常思考转变为一种有纪律的实践，以获得更敏锐的洞察力和可靠的突破吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The 50th Law
RECORDS.bookabout: What if fear were data, not a cage? If chaos hid leverage, and small probes built unstoppable momentum? Could clear boundaries create authority, and mortality sharpen purpose? Ready to turn constraints into capital and a one-time life into decisive action?

RECORDS.bookname: 第50法则
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果把恐惧视为数据，而不是束缚？如果混乱隐藏了杠杆作用，小规模探测能够积蓄不可阻挡的势头？明确的界限是否可以创造权威，生命的短暂是否能增强目标的锐度？准备好将限制转化为资本，把唯一的一次生命转化为果断的行动？

RECORDS.bookname: The Ancestor's Tale: A Pilgrimage to the Dawn of Evolution
RECORDS.bookabout: What if evolution isn't a ladder but a backward pilgrimage through shared ancestors? Would fossils, DNA clocks, and convergent solutions rewrite our place beside apes, microbes, and mitochondria? Ready to question progress, purpose, and what "we" truly means?

RECORDS.bookname: 祖先的故事：进化黎明之旅
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果进化不是一个阶梯，而是通过共同祖先的回溯朝圣，那么化石、DNA时钟和趋同的解决方案会否重新定义我们与猿类、微生物以及线粒体的关系？准备好质疑进步、目的，以及“我们”真正的含义了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Antidote: Happiness for People Who Can't Stand Positive Thinking
RECORDS.bookabout: What if chasing happiness makes you miserable? What if embracing uncertainty, practicing Stoic control and Buddhist non‑attachment, rethinking goals, welcoming failure, and remembering mortality could steady you instead? Ready to trade relentless optimism for grounded, experiment‑driven freedom?

RECORDS.bookname: 解药：不爱积极思考者的幸福指南
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果追求幸福让你感到痛苦？如果拥抱不确定性、练习斯多葛的控制和佛教的无牵无挂、重新思考目标、欢迎失败、记住死亡能够让你稳定下来呢？是否准备好用扎实的、实验驱动的自由来替代不懈的乐观主义？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Cruelty: A Reckoning
RECORDS.bookabout: What if cruelty in art isn't a stain to scrub away, but a test of attention? Could shock clarify rather than numb? When images surge and cool, where do facts, bodies, and responsibility sit—and how should we watch and judge?

RECORDS.bookname: 残酷的艺术：一种审视
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果艺术中的残忍不是需要被抹去的污点，而是对注意力的一种考验呢？震惊是否能够带来清晰而非麻木？当影像迸发又渐渐冷却，事实、身体和责任要如何安放——我们又该如何观看和评判？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Deception: Controlling the Human Element of Security
RECORDS.bookauthor: Kevin D. Mitnick / William L. Simon
RECORDS.bookabout: Think firewalls keep you safe? What happens when a polite voice, a rushed email, and a borrowed badge outflank every gadget? Ready to see how tiny disclosures snowball into breaches—and how process, culture, and rehearsal push back?

RECORDS.bookname: 欺骗的艺术：掌控安全的人类因素
RECORDS.bookauthor: Kevin D. Mitnick / William L. Simon
RECORDS.bookabout: 你认为防火墙能让你安全无虞吗？当一个礼貌的声音、一封匆忙发送的邮件和一枚借来的徽章绕过所有设备时会发生什么？准备好看看微小的泄露如何演变成安全漏洞——以及流程、文化和演练如何抵御这样的入侵？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Gathering: How We Meet and Why It Matters
RECORDS.bookabout: What if gatherings weren't default rituals but engines for meaning? What if exclusions could be kind, rules playful, and friction useful? Could a host craft temporary worlds that change relationships—and end them so the learning actually sticks?

RECORDS.bookname: 聚会的艺术：我们如何相聚以及它为何重要
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果聚会不仅仅是默认的仪式，而是意义的引擎，那会怎样呢？如果排斥可以是善意的，规则可以是有趣的，摩擦可以是有用的，那会怎样呢？一个主持人是否可以创造临时的世界，以改变关系，并结束它们，使收获真正持久呢？

RECORDS.bookname: The Art of Manifesting: Tap into the power of the universe to create change
RECORDS.bookabout: What if happiness were your birthright and change a learned craft?  What if aligning will with imagination, relaxing into alpha, posting a vivid future memory, then acting with gratitude, could quietly reorder reality?

RECORDS.bookname: 显化的艺术：利用宇宙的力量实现改变
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果幸福是你的与生俱来的权利，而改变是一项可以学习的技艺呢？如果将意志与想象力结合，放松进入阿尔法状态，构建一个生动的未来记忆，然后怀着感恩去行动，是否可以悄然重新定义现实？

RECORDS.bookname: The Book of Boundaries: Set the Limits That Will Set You Free
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever feel drained by relatives, colleagues, or your phone—and wonder if a sentence could fix it?  Learn a self-led method—clear scripts, Green/Yellow/Red responses, and enforceable consequences—to protect energy, relationships, and work without overexplaining or guilt.

RECORDS.bookname: 界限之书：设定让你自由的限制
RECORDS.bookabout: 是否曾感到被亲戚、同事或手机耗尽了精力，并想过一句话能否解决这个问题？了解一个自我引导的方法——清晰的脚本，绿色/黄色/红色回应，以及可执行的后果——以在不需要过度解释或感到愧疚的情况下保护自己的能量、关系和工作。

RECORDS.bookname: The Book of Forgiving: The Fourfold Path for Healing Ourselves and Our World
RECORDS.bookabout: What if healing your deepest wounds also mended your community? What if forgiveness were a trainable practice, with clear steps, that honored truth, protected justice, and rewrote relationships—including with yourself? Ready to trade revenge loops for renewal?

RECORDS.bookname: 宽恕之书：治愈自己和世界的四重之道
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果治愈你内心最深的伤口也能修复你的社区怎么办？如果宽恕是一种可以训练的实践，拥有明确的步骤，能够尊重真相、维护正义并重新建立关系——包括与自己的关系——那会怎样？准备好用更新来代替复仇循环了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Conscious Mind: In Search of a Fundamental Theory
RECORDS.bookabout: What if conscious experience isn't deducible from physics? What holds our sensations together, and could machines share them? Can new psychophysical laws link brains to qualia without magic? Ready to test zombies, Mary, and dancing qualia against reality?

RECORDS.bookname: 意识的心智：寻求一种基础理论
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果意识体验无法从物理学中推导出来怎么办？是什么将我们的感知连接在一起，机器能够分享这些感受吗？有没有新的心理物理法则可以在不依赖魔法的情况下将大脑与感质联系起来？准备好在现实中测试僵尸、玛丽和跳舞感质了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Creative Thinking Handbook: Your Step-by-Step Guide to Problem Solving in Business
RECORDS.bookabout: How do you turn chaos into clarity, ideas into decisions, and pilots into momentum? What if creativity isn't luck but a four‑step system—define, generate, evaluate, act—powered by metacognition, smart tools, and leadership that protects time, questions assumptions, and scales learning?

RECORDS.bookname: 创意思维手册：解决商业问题的逐步指南
RECORDS.bookabout: 如何将混乱转化为明晰，将创意转化为决策，将试点转化为动力？如果说创造力不是运气，而是一套由元认知、智能工具和保护时间、质疑假设及扩大化学习的领导力推动的四步系统——定义、生成、评估、行动——会怎样呢？

RECORDS.bookname: The Crown and Its Records: Archives, Access, and the Ancient Constitution in Seventeenth-Century England
RECORDS.bookabout: Who truly rules: the king, Parliament, or whoever controls the keys to the archives? What if catalogs, calendars, and seized trunks decide liberties? From monastic chests to the State Paper Office, it charts power forged through records, precedent, and print.

RECORDS.bookname: 王冠与其记录：十七世纪英国的档案、访问与古代宪法
RECORDS.bookabout: 究竟是谁真正掌控着权力：国王、议会，还是那些掌握档案钥匙的人？如果目录、日历和被没收的箱子决定了自由呢？从修道院的箱子到国家文件办公室，权力通过记录、先例和印刷而得以形成。

RECORDS.bookname: The Cult of the Amateur: How Today's Internet is Killing Our Culture
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the web's promise of democratization breeds noise, erodes expertise, and turns privacy into currency? What happens when amateurs rule, platforms predict our choices, and culture fragments—can institutions, families, and classrooms rebuild trust, value, and attention?

RECORDS.bookname: 业余者的崇拜：现代互联网如何毁灭我们的文化
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果网络所承诺的民主化带来了噪音，削弱了专业性，并将隐私变成了货币，那会怎样？当业余爱好者主导，平台预测我们的选择，文化出现裂痕时，会发生什么——机构、家庭和课堂能否重建信任、价值和注意力呢？

RECORDS.bookname: The Data Detective: Ten Easy Rules to Make Sense of Statistics
RECORDS.bookabout: What if every number had a maker, a motive, and a margin of error? Could curiosity outrun outrage, and slow statistics tame headlines? Ready to test definitions, question algorithms, and let good charts reshape what you think you know?

RECORDS.bookname: 数据侦探：理解统计的十个简单规则
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果每一个数字都有一个创造者、动机和误差范围呢？好奇心能否胜过愤怒，缓和统计数据，驯服头条新闻？准备好检验定义、质疑算法，并让优秀的图表重新塑造你的认知？

RECORDS.bookname: The Elements of Scrum
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of waterfall delays and guesswork? Want a simple cadence that turns uncertainty into value, with clear roles, visible artifacts, and engineering habits that keep code honest? Curious how teams plan, learn, and ship—every sprint?

RECORDS.bookname: Scrum的要素
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了瀑布式方法的拖延和猜测？想要一种简单的节奏，将不确定性转化为价值，拥有明确的角色、可见的成果以及保持代码诚实的工程习惯吗？好奇团队如何计划、学习和交付——在每个迭代周期中？

RECORDS.bookname: The End of Absence: Reclaiming What We’ve Lost in a World of Constant Connection
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the last true silence is already behind us? What does relentless connection do to memory, attention, and intimacy? And could choosing absence—engineered solitude, selective media, slower learning—be the most practical technology we have left?

RECORDS.bookname: 缺席的终结：重拾我们在不断连接的世界中失去的东西
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果最后的真正宁静已经成为过去，那无休止的连接会对记忆、注意力和亲密关系造成什么影响？选择缺席——有计划的孤独、选择性媒体、缓慢学习——是否可能成为我们所剩下的最实际技术？

RECORDS.bookname: The Evolution of God
RECORDS.bookabout: How did gods shift from tribal patrons to universal moral anchors as trade and empires widened non-zero-sum ties?  Could tolerance be a byproduct of roads and markets, with moral imagination expanding when cooperation pays?  What happens when life feels zero-sum?

RECORDS.bookname: 上帝的演变
RECORDS.bookabout: 随着贸易和帝国扩大了非零和联系，神祇是如何从部落赞助转变为普遍道德支柱的？宽容是否可能是道路和市场的副产品，合作带来收益时，道德想象力会因此扩展？当生活感觉是零和时会发生什么？

RECORDS.bookname: The Evolving Self: A Psychology for the Third Millennium
RECORDS.bookabout: Who steers your attention—genes, culture, or you? Can flow be both engine and compass for a life of rising complexity? What if memes exploit you, yet disciplined play, civic design, and transcendent aims let your choices echo beyond death?

RECORDS.bookname: 成长的自我：新千年的心理学
RECORDS.bookabout: 谁在引导你的注意力——基因、文化，还是你自己？在日益复杂的人生中，能否让心流既成为动力又成为指南？如果模因利用你，而通过有纪律的娱乐、社会设计和超越的目标，你的选择能够在死后仍然回荡，那么会怎样？

RECORDS.bookname: The Extended Phenotype: The Long Reach of the Gene
RECORDS.bookabout: What if bodies are only one edge of a phenotype? Could dams, mounds, and manipulated hosts count as an organism's reach? Who truly benefits from behavior—the performer or the replicators behind it? Ready to flip the evolutionary cube?

RECORDS.bookname: 延展的表型：基因的长远影响
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果身体只是表型的一个边缘呢？水坝、土丘和被操控的宿主能否算作生物体的延伸？谁真正从行为中获益——是表演者还是背后的复制者？准备好翻转进化的立方体吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Filter Bubble: What the Internet Is Hiding from You
RECORDS.bookabout: Who decides what you see online, and what vanishes without a trace? How do personalization and data markets mold attention, identity, and politics? Can invisible campaigns thrive while public debate thins—and can design, policy, and intentional curiosity reopen the commons?

RECORDS.bookname: 过滤气泡：互联网对你的隐瞒
RECORDS.bookabout: 是谁决定了你在网上看到的内容，以及哪些内容悄然消失？个性化和数据市场如何塑造注意力、身份和政治？当公众辩论减弱时，隐形的活动是否能兴盛起来——而设计、政策和有意的好奇心能否重新开启公众空间？

RECORDS.bookname: The First 90 Days: Proven Strategies for Getting Up to Speed Faster and Smarter, Updated and Expanded
RECORDS.bookabout: New role looming? What if your first 90 days were a system: read context with STARS, align through five boss conversations, deliver early wins, architect strategy–structure–process–skills, build alliances, steady yourself, then accelerate everyone's transitions for advantage ?

RECORDS.bookname: 前90天：加速和聪明提升的验证策略，更新与扩展版
RECORDS.bookabout: 新角色在即？如果你的头90天是一套系统：通过STARS了解背景，通过五次与上司的对话达成一致，取得早期胜利，构建战略-结构-流程-技能，建立联盟，稳定自身，然后加速每个人的过渡以获得优势会如何？

RECORDS.bookname: The Knowledge Illusion: Why We Never Think Alone
RECORDS.bookabout: Think you truly understand how things work, or are you borrowing know-how from your hive without noticing?  What if confidence swells after a search while depth stays thin, and only causal explanation tames extremes?   Ready to rethink intelligence as teamwork?

RECORDS.bookname: 知识幻觉：为什么我们从未独自思考
RECORDS.bookabout: 你是否真的理解事物的运作方式，还是在不知不觉中从你的集体中借用了知识？当搜索后信心增加，但深度仍然浅薄，只有因果解释能平息极端情况时，该如何应对？准备好将智能重新思考为团队合作了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Lonely City: Adventures in the Art of Being Alone
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever felt lonelier in crowds than alone? Wondered how windows, cameras, and collages become lifelines? This journey maps urban isolation, stigma, and mediated intimacy, showing how art repairs fractures and teaches attention—could loneliness become a shared language, a civic practice?

RECORDS.bookname: 孤独之城：独处的艺术探险
RECORDS.bookabout: 曾经在人群中感到比独处时更孤独吗？想过窗户、相机和拼贴画如何成为生命线吗？这段旅程描绘了城市孤独、污名与媒介化亲密关系，展示了艺术如何修复裂痕并教授关注——孤独能否成为一种共享语言，一种公民实践？

RECORDS.bookname: The Long View: Career Strategies to Start Strong, Reach High, and Go Far
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a career isn't a ladder but a 50-year portfolio? How do you compound skills, experiences, and relationships, navigate crossroads, and build platforms others run? Ready to trade titles for learning curves—and significance?

RECORDS.bookname: 长远眼光：职场策略指导你起步稳健、达至高峰、走得更远
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果一份职业不再是一架阶梯，而是一个长达50年的投资组合呢？你如何累积技能、经验和人际关系，如何在十字路口正确抉择，如何搭建他人能够使用的平台？准备好用学习曲线和意义去交换头衔了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Menopause Reset: Get Rid of Your Symptoms and Feel Like Your Younger Self Again
RECORDS.bookabout: What if midlife were a reset, not a decline? Curious how fasting, oxytocin, and lab-guided choices calm hot flashes, brain fog, and weight gain? Ready to use light, heat, oxygen, and mindset to turn symptoms into signals—and resilience?

RECORDS.bookname: 更年期重塑：消除症状，重拾年轻自我
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果中年时期是重启而非衰退，会怎样？是否好奇禁食、催产素和实验室指导选择如何缓解潮热、脑雾和体重增加？准备好利用光、热、氧气和心态来将症状转化为信号——以及韧性了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Missionary Position: Mother Teresa in Theory and Practice
RECORDS.bookabout: What if the halo was built by cameras, not heaven? What if pain relief yielded to theology, and charity meant secret baptisms at the bedside? Would a hard audit of words, money, and clinics change what we think we know?

RECORDS.bookname: 传道姿势：理论与实践中的特蕾莎修女
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果光环是由相机而不是天堂打造的呢？如果止痛服从于神学，慈善意味着在病床边进行秘密洗礼呢？对语言、金钱和诊所进行严格审计，会改变我们自认为了解的内容吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Moral Animal: Why We Are, the Way We Are: The New Science of Evolutionary Psychology
RECORDS.bookabout: Why do love, jealousy, friendship, and conscience feel so personal if they're sculpted by selection? Is monogamy "natural," self-deception strategic, status biologically tuned? When science demystifies virtue, can responsibility, compassion, and shared rules still hold communities together?

RECORDS.bookname: 道德动物：我们为何如此：进化心理学的新科学
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果爱、嫉妒、友谊和良心是由选择雕刻而成，为什么它们却让人感到如此个人化？一夫一妻制是“自然”的存在吗？自我欺骗是策略吗？地位是生物学上调节的吗？当科学揭开美德的神秘面纱时，责任、同情以及共享规则还能将社区团结在一起吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The New Rules of Marketing & PR: How to Use Content Marketing, Podcasting, Social Media, AI, Live Video, and Newsjacking to Reach Buyers Directly
RECORDS.bookabout: Tired of shouting into the void? What if buyers found you first—through useful content, smart distribution, and real‑time moves? Curious how measurement, conversion, and AI knit it all together into momentum? Ready to replace campaigns with relationships?

RECORDS.bookname: 营销与公关新规则：如何利用内容营销、播客、社交媒体、人工智能、直播视频及新闻劫持直接触达买家
RECORDS.bookabout: 厌倦了对着空虚大喊大叫吗？如果买家通过有用的内容、智能分发和实时活动主动找到你，会怎么样呢？想知道如何测量、转化和人工智能将这一切结合成势能吗？准备好用关系代替广告活动了吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Opposable Mind: How Successful Leaders Win Through Integrative Thinking
RECORDS.bookabout: What if tension isn't a problem but a resource? What if you could hold contradictions and design a third way? Curious how stance, tools, and lived experiments turn trade-offs into advantages across investing, strategy, and service? Read on.

RECORDS.bookname: 对立思维：成功领导者如何通过整合思维制胜
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果紧张不是问题，而是资源会怎样？如果你能容纳矛盾并设计出第三条路呢？好奇站位、工具和实践如何将权衡转化为投资、战略和服务中的优势吗？继续阅读吧。

RECORDS.bookname: The Origins of Totalitarianism: With a New Introduction by Anne Applebaum
RECORDS.bookabout: How did prejudice morph into a political weapon, empires teach race to rule, and crowds become movements that replaced states? What happens when propaganda becomes identity, police become law, and camps test whether everything—even humanity—can be remade?

RECORDS.bookname: 极权主义的起源：安妮·阿普尔鲍姆全新导读版
RECORDS.bookabout: 偏见如何演变成政治武器，帝国如何用种族来统治国家，群体如何转变成取代国家的运动？当宣传变成身份认同，警察化身为法律，营地试验是否一切——甚至人性——都能被重塑时，会发生什么？

RECORDS.bookname: The People Vs Tech: How the Internet Is Killing Democracy (and How We Save It)
RECORDS.bookabout: Is public life now steered by an "advertising panopticon" where fast emotion overrides judgment? Do data monopolies turn market power into cultural sway, shrinking the commons? Can crypto free us without breaking enforcement—and can democracy upgrade in time?

RECORDS.bookname: 科技对决人民：互联网如何扼杀民主（以及我们如何拯救它）
RECORDS.bookabout: 公共生活现在是否由一个“广告全景监狱”所引导，在这个环境中，快速的情感超越了判断力？数据垄断是否将市场力量转化为文化影响力，缩小了公共领域？加密货币能否在不打破规则执行的情况下让我们获得自由，而民主能否及时升级？

RECORDS.bookname: The People's Platform: Taking Back Power and Culture in the Digital Age
RECORDS.bookabout: Think the internet set culture free? What if attention markets replaced old gatekeepers, abundance starved creators, and openness masked inequality? Curious how institutions and public options might sustain art beyond clicks? Turn the page and test those assumptions.

RECORDS.bookname: 人民平台：在数字时代夺回权力和文化
RECORDS.bookabout: 认为互联网让文化自由了吗？如果注意力市场取代了旧的守门人，丰富性让创作者饥饿，而开放性掩盖了不平等，会怎么样？是否好奇机构和公共选择如何在点击之外支持艺术创作？翻开新的一页，检验这些假设吧。

RECORDS.bookname: The Portable Atheist: Essential Readings for the Nonbeliever
RECORDS.bookabout: Can ethics flourish without heaven? What happens when miracles meet evidence, and fear confronts reason? Across philosophy, science, and literature, this anthology tests power, comforts, and dogma—asking whether a human-centered, secular courage can replace deference with responsibility.

RECORDS.bookname: 随身的无神论者：非信徒的必读文选
RECORDS.bookabout: 道德在没有天堂的情况下能够繁荣吗？当奇迹遇见证据，恐惧面对理智时会发生什么？在哲学、科学和文学的领域中，这部文集考察了权力、安慰和教条——询问人类为中心的世俗勇气是否可以用责任替代顺从。

RECORDS.bookname: The Power of a Positive No: Save The Deal Save The Relationship and Still Say No
RECORDS.bookabout: Ever wish you could say No without burning bridges? What if refusal could protect your priorities, grow respect, and even invite collaboration? Ready to master a simple Yes–No–Yes rhythm that steadies emotions, disarms pressure, and unlocks better outcomes?

RECORDS.bookname: 积极拒绝的力量：挽救交易，维护关系，还要说不
RECORDS.bookabout: 是否曾希望能够拒绝而不损害关系？如果拒绝可以保护你的优先事项、增加尊重，甚至邀请合作，你会怎样做？准备好掌握一个简单的“是——否——是”的节奏，这可以稳定情绪、化解压力，并开启更好的结果吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Power of Moments: Why Certain Experiences Have Extraordinary Impact
RECORDS.bookabout: What if a few designed moments could reshape memory, spark insight, fuel pride, and knit stronger bonds? Want to learn how elevation, surprise, stretching challenges, and shared rituals turn ordinary days into defining experiences you actually remember—and act on?

RECORDS.bookname: 关键时刻的力量：为何某些经历具有非凡影响力
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果几个精心设计的时刻可以重塑记忆、激发灵感、燃起自豪感，并织造更紧密的纽带，该怎么办？想了解如何通过提升、惊喜、挑战以及共享仪式，将平凡的日子转变为真正让你铭记并行动的重要时刻吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Pursuit of Happyness
RECORDS.bookabout: From a violent childhood to Navy precision, from lab benches to Wall Street phones—what holds a life together? Could stillness beat panic, a stroller outrun despair, and fatherhood redefine wealth? Want a blueprint for resilience that becomes responsibility?

RECORDS.bookname: 当幸福来敲门
RECORDS.bookabout: 从暴力的童年到海军的精准训练，从实验室的工作台到华尔街的电话机——是什么让一个人生存下去？宁静能否战胜恐慌，婴儿车能否超越绝望，而为人父能否重新定义财富？想要一个将韧性转变为责任的蓝图吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Rational Male
RECORDS.bookabout: Are relationships governed by luck, or by incentives we can read and direct? What if power comes from needing less? Could unlearning romance myths, building options, and communicating boundaries turn confusion into strategy—and desire into durable, chosen commitment?

RECORDS.bookname: 理性的男性
RECORDS.bookabout: 关系是由运气决定，还是由我们可以识别和引导的激励因素所驱动？如果力量源于需求更少会怎样？是否可以通过卸载浪漫的神话、建立选择和沟通界限，将困惑转变为策略，并将欲望转化为持久的、经过选择的承诺？

RECORDS.bookname: The Red Parts: Autobiography of a Trial
RECORDS.bookabout: What happens when a cold case promises certainty yet breeds doubts? When DNA glows, headlines flatter, and grief resists closure? Can writing hold time, violence, and memory together—keeping faith with an "open murder" that refuses a neat story?

RECORDS.bookname: 红色部分：一次审判的自传
RECORDS.bookabout: 当一个悬案承诺带来确定性却滋生疑惑时，会发生什么？当DNA亮起、媒体赞扬、而悲痛拒绝结束时，会如何？写作能否将时间、暴力和记忆结合在一起——坚持与一个拒绝简单故事的“未结案凶杀案”保持信念？

RECORDS.bookname: The Revolutionary: Samuel Adams
RECORDS.bookabout: What if rebellion wasn't born in a battlefield, but in galleries, town meetings, and pseudonymous essays? How did one disciplined organizer turn rituals, networks, and moral rhetoric into consensus—and make independence feel like ordinary duty?

RECORDS.bookname: 革命者：塞缪尔·亚当斯
RECORDS.bookabout: 如果反叛不是诞生于战场，而是在画廊、镇会议和化名文章中萌芽，那会怎样？一个严谨的组织者是如何将仪式、网络和道德修辞转化为共识，并让争取独立的行为成为一种平常的责任感？

RECORDS.bookname: The Science of Leonardo: Inside the Mind of the Great Genius of the Renaissance
RECORDS.bookabout: How did a Renaissance workshop apprentice turn drawings into experiments, optics into physiology, and city plans into ecological systems? What if water, light, and flight were one language of nature? Ready to watch science and art evolve together?

RECORDS.bookname: 达·芬奇的科学：文艺复兴伟大天才的心灵探秘
RECORDS.bookabout: 一个文艺复兴时期的作坊学徒是如何将图纸转化为实验，将光学转化为生理学，并将城市规划转化为生态系统的？如果水、光与飞行都是大自然的一种语言，那会怎样呢？准备好见证科学与艺术共同进化吗？

RECORDS.bookname: The Future Is Asian: Commerce, Conflict, and Culture in the 21st Century
RECORDS.bookabout: Why does Asia's rise feel less like a surprise and more like a return waiting to be noticed? And how did its old networks quietly rebuild themselves into today's global force? If you're curious about who now shapes the world's rhythm, this story waits for you.

RECORDS.bookname: 亚洲未来：21世纪的商业、冲突与文化
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么亚洲的崛起感觉不像是一个惊喜，而更像是等待被注意的回归？而它的旧有网络又是如何悄然重建，成为今天的全球力量？如果你对当今谁在塑造世界的节奏感到好奇，那么这个故事正等着你去发现。

RECORDS.bookname: Why We Buy: The Science of Shopping
RECORDS.bookabout: What if shopping isn't just about buying? Have you ever wondered how store layouts influence what you buy? Could it be that sensory experiences and online trends shape your decisions more than you realize?

RECORDS.bookname: 我们为什么购买：购物科学探究
RECORDS.bookabout: 购物不仅仅是购买吗？你是否曾想过，商店布局如何影响你的购买行为？感官体验和在线趋势是否可能比你意识到的更能塑造你的决策？

RECORDS.bookname: American Wasteland: How America Throws Away Nearly Half of Its Food (and What We Can Do About It)
RECORDS.bookabout: Why does a nation overflowing with food still throw so much away—and let people go hungry at the same time? How did waste become routine, and what would it take to reverse it? This book follows that unsettling trail and reveals surprising answers.

RECORDS.bookname: 美国废弃之地：美国如何浪费近一半的食物（以及我们能做些什么）
RECORDS.bookabout: 为什么一个食物充盈的国家仍然有大量食物被丢弃，同时又让人挨饿？浪费是如何成为常态的，又需要什么来扭转这一局面？本书沿着这个让人不安的轨迹进行探寻，并揭示了令人惊讶的答案。
